example_en: I dare say you know about it already.

example_en: Building such a bridge over the bay was a hard nut to crack but the local government made it within two years.

example_en: I certainly don't want to accuse of them having bad intentions.

example_zh: 一般来说，促使因素叠加显然比原产地提供的条件更易获得良好的生活和物质福利。

example_zh: 我需要登广告为我下学期找一个室友。

example_en: Prefabrication will affect to an uncomplicated transportation, effective samlingsproces, rational dismantling and transfer.
example_zh: 预制件工程优点是运输简便，有效自我调整，合理拆除和转移。

example_en: We can't afford to slip up.

example_en: She agreed to come, after a little gentle persuasion.

example_en: He would go over his work again and again until he felt he had it right.

example_en: We finished 15 minutes ahead of time.
example_zh: 我们提前15分钟完成。

example_en: The election was held six months ahead of schedule.

example_en: We finished 15 minutes ahead of time.

example_en: He said he would aim for the 100 metre world record at the world championships in August.

example_en: As concerns demand: the world's population is set to increase from six to nine billion in 2050.
example_zh: 需求方面：世界人口将从60亿增加到2050年的90亿。

example_zh: 假如你想给自己配上一个腕带，请选择一个相对于超瘦腰带稍宽大些的风格。

example_zh: 你不要像往常那样喋喋不休，否则你会被送回来的，这是千真万确的！

example_zh: 还有一些其他技巧可以帮助你确定一年的头几个月的日期——例如，二月的最后一天总是锚日，不管闰年还是平年。

example_zh: 当裁判以每秒两米的速度移动时，裁判做出了正确的判罚。

example_zh: 他们告诉雅克·得洛斯，必须不惜一切代价避免灾难性的世界贸易大战。

example_zh: 大多数药或者没有真正疗效，或者最多也就是稍有疗效。

example_zh: 顺便问一句，几点钟了？

example_en: Many drugs were found by trial and error.
example_zh: 许多药物都是经过反复试验后才被发现的。

example_en: They wash dishes by turns.
example_zh: 他们轮流洗碗碟。

example_en: She got the job by virtue of her greater experience.
example_zh: 她由于经验较为丰富而得到了那份工作。

example_en: She should leave him by way of divorce.
example_zh: 她应该通过离婚的方式来离开他。

example_en: A thank-you note or telephone call after the visit is also considered polite and is an appropriate way to express your appreciation for the invitation.
example_zh: 拜访后的一封感谢信或一个电话也被视作一种礼貌，是一种表达你对收到邀请的感谢的适当方式。

example_en: Can you call back tomorrow?
example_zh: 明天你能回电话吗？

example_en: I'll call for you at 7 o'clock.
example_zh: 我7点钟去接你。

example_en: They were kind enough to send us this magnetic tank which we'll call forth from the computer solutions to a series of problems.
example_zh: 他们很好心地给我们送来了这个磁箱，可以用电脑来解决一系列的问题。

example_en: I'll take the call in my office.
example_zh: 我要在办公室里接这个电话。

example_en: I call in question the accuracy of these figures.
example_zh: 我怀疑这些数字的准确性。

example_en: These findings call into question the effectiveness of many supplements on supermarket shelves.
example_zh: 这些发现都在质疑超市货架上很多补充剂的效力。

example_en: Let 's tell the noses and call it a day.
example_zh: 咱们计算一下人数收工吧。

example_en: So we should probably just call it a night.
example_zh: 所以我们可能今晚就到此为止了。

example_en: There is no attempt to call off the race.
example_zh: 没有取消比赛的意图。

example_en: He decided to pay a call on Tommy Cummings.
example_zh: 他决定去拜访汤米·卡明斯。

example_en: He can't run in the halls, cut in line, call out, or swing his paintbrush around.
example_zh: 他不能在走廊奔跑，不能插队，不能大声叫喊，或到处挥舞画笔。

example_en: Now I'm going to call the roll.
example_zh: 我现在开始点名。

example_en: We call up our friends.
example_zh: 我们召集朋友。

example_en: I now call upon the chairman to address the meeting.
example_zh: 现在请主席向大会致辞。

example_en: We will go back to normal when things calm down.
example_zh: 一切平息下来后，我们将恢复正常。

example_en: The book just came apart in my hands.
example_zh: 这本书就在我手中散开了。

example_en: He is spearheading a campaign for a new stadium in the town.
example_zh: 他正发起一项运动，呼吁在城里新建一座体育场。

example_en: I can not help think the same.
example_zh: 我不禁也有同样的想法。

example_en: I cannot but agree to your decision.
example_zh: 我不得不同意你的决定。

example_en: The robot cannot help you with housework, but it will develop your ability to love.
example_zh: 机器人不能帮助你做家务，但它会培养你去爱的能力。

example_en: Tonight, I cannot help but marvel at how far we have come together.
example_zh: 今晚，我不禁对双方交往的长足进展感到惊叹。

example_en: Doctors cannot effect a cure if the disease has spread too far.
example_zh: 假如这种疾病已扩散得厉害，医生也无法妙手回春。

example_en: I wouldn't have thought him capable of it.
example_zh: 我不会想到他能干这事。

example_en: I don't really care for spicy food.
example_zh: 我其实不喜欢吃辛辣食物。

example_en: Come on. Carry my bag on your back.
example_zh: 来，背上我的包。

example_en: We should carry forward the spirit of serving the people whole-heartedly.
example_zh: 我们要发扬全心全意为人民服务的精神。

example_en: I see a new Messiah coming with the sword, to carry into effect the teachings of the first.
example_zh: 我看见一个带着剑的弥撒亚，把先前的教育转化为实际运用。

example_en: You gentle so approach, carry off my palpitation.
example_zh: 你的温柔如此靠近，带走我的心跳。

example_en: That's it, carry on!
example_zh: 对啦！继续！

example_en: She needed a clear head to carry out her instructions.
example_zh: 她需要一个清醒的头脑来执行命令。

example_en: Attitudes learned at home carry over into the playground.
example_zh: 家里养成的作风会表现在学校的运动场上。

example_en: We don't have the confidence that the U.N. will carry through a sustained programme.
example_zh: 我们没有信心的是，联合国能否将该项目长期坚持下去。

example_en: These concerns carry weight.
example_zh: 这些担忧有一定的分量。

example_en: Horses were adopted by peoples of the West African savannah, and later their powerful cavalry forces allowed them to carve out large empires.
example_zh: 西非大草原上的人们驯养了马，后来他们强大的骑兵部队使他们得以建立起庞大的帝国。

example_en: Yet it is another kind of commercial attempt to carve up the Internet that is causing more concern.
example_zh: 这种商业上划分互联网的企图正在引起更多的关注。

example_en: The TV set we bought was for cash down .
example_zh: 这台电视我们是用现金买的。

example_en: They took cash in lieu of the prize they had won.
example_zh: 他们没有领奖品而是领了现金。

example_en: If you come across a wayward chunk of moon, don't try to cash in on it.
example_zh: 如果你遇到一大块形状不规则的月球岩石，不要企图拿它卖钱。

example_en: The teacher cast about for a better example.
example_zh: 老师在思索一个更好的例子。

example_en: The teacher cast about for a better example.
example_zh: 老师在思索一个更好的例子。

example_en: She cast around desperately for a safe topic of conversation.
example_zh: 她绞尽脑汁寻找稳妥的话题。

example_en: The experiments with domestication probably occurred in many places, as people living in ever-drier environments cast around for more predictable food supplies.
example_zh: 随着人们居住环境不断变得干燥，以及食物供给的可预测性越来越强，驯化尝试很可能会在很多地方进行。

example_en: We need to cast aside outdated policies.
example_zh: 我们要废除不合时宜的政策。

example_en: Cast back the reasons which this group formed.
example_zh: 并追溯这一群体形成的主要原因。

example_en: Does this information cast light on the problem?
example_zh: 这一信息会澄清这个问题吗？

example_en: Can anybody cast light upon how this chair got broken?
example_zh: 谁能查清楚这把椅子坏掉的原因因呢?。

example_en: And Saul said, Cast lots between me and Jonathan my son. And Jonathan was taken.
example_zh: 扫罗说，你们再掣签，看是我，是我儿子约拿单，就掣出约拿单来。

example_en: By 9:30 we had cast off and were heading downriver.
example_zh: 在9:30之前我们已经起航并且向下游行驶。

example_en: Becoming separated from the tribe—or worse, being cast out—was a death sentence.
example_zh: 从部落中脱离出来，或者甚至更糟，被赶出部落，相当于被判死刑。

example_en: Never catch at a falling knife.
example_zh: 千万不要试图接住掉落的刀。

example_en: Dry grass and trees easily catch fire.
example_zh: 干草和树很容易引起火灾。

example_en: Catch hold of this rope—Will the roof bear?
example_zh: 抓住这根绳子——屋顶能受得了吗？

example_en: He is very quick to catch on to things.
example_zh: 他领悟能力很强。

example_en: There was less to catch one's eye, of course.
example_zh: 没有太多的捕捉一个人的眼睛，当然。

example_en: You just wait till I catch you out!
example_zh: 你就等着我抓到你吧！

example_en: We may even catch sight of a polar bear on the ice.
example_zh: 我们甚至可能突然看到一只北极熊在冰面上。

example_en: Go on ahead. I'll catch up with you.
example_zh: 你先走，我随后赶上你。

example_en: He stopped and let her catch up with him.
example_zh: 他停下了，让她赶上自己。

example_en: The President is unlikely to cave in to demands for a public inquiry.
example_zh: 总统未必会屈服而同意进行公开调查。

example_en: There wasn't a convention center around to help joining visitors and was the only nearby hotel eventually closed down for that same reason.
example_zh: 该步行街附近没有会议中心，不能汇集各地的游客，附近的酒店也是因为同一原因而最终倒闭。

example_en: The fire was reported at 9:26 pm at an old shopping center on Michigan Avenue near St. Mary's Church.
example_zh: 据报道，这场火灾发生在晚上9点26分，地点是在圣玛丽教堂附近密歇根大街上的一间老旧购物中心。

example_en: You take a chance on the weather if you holiday in Maine.
example_zh: 你若在缅因州度假，对天气得碰运气。

example_en: Perhaps you might chance upon the dictionary at some old bookstall.
example_zh: 或许你会在旧书摊上偶然发现这本字典。

example_en: Tearful begging for not change one's mind about, but will lose more embarrassed.
example_zh: 泪流满面的乞求换不了回心转意，只是会输的更加难堪而已。

example_en: Some plastic materials change over time.
example_zh: 有些塑料随着时间的推移而改变。

example_en: Accuse sb of doing STH charge sb with doing STH.
example_zh: 因为某事指控某人，指控某人做了某事。

example_en: We'd chase down the ice cream truck on bikes.
example_zh: 我们骑自行车追冰淇淋车。

example_en: "People cheat on their sleep, and they don't even realize they're doing it," says Dr. David.
example_zh: “人们在睡眠时也会欺骗，而且他们甚至没有意识到自己正在这样做。”大卫博士说。

example_en: I'll call the hotel. I'll tell them we'll check in tomorrow.
example_zh: 我会给旅馆打电话，通知他们明天我们将登记入住。

example_en: Check out the new website. It's the bomb!
example_zh: 看一看这新网站。简直是太棒了！

example_en: No, I think I'll drop in the day after tomorrow to check up.
example_zh: 不，我想我后天会顺道去看看，检查下。

example_en: I need to check up on a few things before I can decide.
example_zh: 我得核实几件事情才能作决定。

example_en: Welcome all students to cheer on the players!
example_zh: 欢迎所有同学来为运动员加油打气！

example_en: Oh, don't be so childish! Cheer up!
example_zh: 哎呀，别这么孩子气！振作起来！

example_en: You should chew over this thing.
example_zh: 你应当好好思量这件事。

example_en: His voice would choke up, he is sure.
example_zh: 他的嗓音会哽咽，他确信这一点。

example_en: Even through you did't clap eyes on your campus life seriously, you will slop over when leaving.
example_zh: 即便你没有认真地注视过大学生活，你也会有一种离别时的伤感。

example_en: I clean out all the grease and replace it with oil so it works better in very low temperatures.
example_zh: 我清除掉了所有的油脂，以油替换，因此它在很低的温度下运转得更好。

example_en: Who's going to clean up this mess?
example_zh: 这么又脏又乱的，谁来清理？

example_en: I'll just clear away the breakfast things.
example_zh: 我这就收拾早餐餐具。

example_en: You've no right to be here. Clear off!
example_zh: 你无权在这里，走开！

example_en: Their dream is to clear out 90 percent of all the ocean plastic by 2040.
example_zh: 他们的梦想是到2040年时清除90%的海洋塑料。

example_en: It's time to clear up.
example_zh: 该打扫了。

example_en: For all that the "licence Raj" was supposedly scrapped two decades ago, it can still take nearly 200 days to get a construction permit and seven years to close a business.
example_zh: 尽管据说是二十年前就废止了“许可证制度”，但至今仍要花上近200天才能拿到施工许可，以及花七年的时间来关闭一家企业。

example_en: He was close about his past.
example_zh: 他对他的过去守口如瓶。

example_en: A combination of internal and external factors caused the company to close down.
example_zh: 内外因结合导致了公司的倒闭。

example_en: Germany ran Argentina very close in the final.
example_zh: 在决赛中，德国队发挥得几乎和阿根廷队一样出色。

example_en: She snuggled close up to him.
example_zh: 她紧紧地依偎着他。

example_en: I staggered and had to clutch at a chair for support.
example_zh: 我踉跄了几步，不得不抓住一把椅子扶稳。

example_en: She agreed to collaborate with him in writing her biography.
example_zh: 她同意与他合作撰写她的传记。

example_en: How did this unhappy state of affairs come about?
example_zh: 这种不幸的情况是怎么发生的呢？

example_en: Did he come across as a sane, rational person?
example_zh: 他看上去是不是一个头脑清醒而理智的人？

example_en: Monday does come after Sunday.
example_zh: 星期日之后是星期一。

example_en: Your French has come along a lot recently.
example_zh: 你的法语最近进步很大。

example_en: I hope I can get Bobby back in this sack. He's starting to swell and come apart on me.
example_zh: 我希望这个麻袋还能装得下博比。他已经开始发胀，似乎随时都会在我身上散架。

example_en: My birthday seems to come around quicker every year.
example_zh: 我的生日似乎一年比一年来得快。

example_en: Have I come at an awkward time?
example_zh: 我来得不是时候吧？

example_en: There's a great deal to come before that!
example_zh: 在那之前还有许多事情要做呢！

example_en: I'd hate anything to come between us.
example_zh: 我不喜欢任何有损我们之间关系的事情。

example_en: Is it okay if I come by myself?
example_zh: 我独自来行吗？

example_en: We were forced to come down in a field.
example_zh: 我们被迫降落在田野里。

example_en: Despite all the reliability upgrades, with 70-mile winds, the trees will not just sway but come down on poles and wires.
example_zh: 尽管所有的可靠性升级，在70迈的大风中，树木可不会光摇摆，而是直接砸到电杆和线路上。

example_en: Right. What I want now is two volunteers to come down to the front.
example_zh: 对了。我现在需要的就是两个自告奋勇者到前面来。

example_en: I've only come for an hour.
example_zh: 我来了才一个小时。

example_en: More books and most of the best come forth in the autumn.
example_zh: 在秋天里，人们会写出更多的著作，而且大多数是上乘之作。

example_en: Let her come home safely!
example_zh: 让她平平安安回家吧！

example_en: Oh good, Tom's just come in.
example_zh: 嗯好，汤姆正好进来了。

example_en: Could you come in for an informal interview, later this week, maybe?
example_zh: 你能在这周晚些时候来这里接受一次非正式面试吗？

example_en: He'd come into the clubhouse every day.
example_zh: 他会每天到俱乐部会所来。

example_en: It will come into being soon.
example_zh: 很快就会产生了。

example_en: New controls come into effect next month.
example_zh: 下月开始实施新的管制措施。

example_en: When do the new regulations come into force?
example_zh: 新规章什么时候开始执行？

example_en: When angel turns into devil, I come to realize that living in hell or heaven just lies in the choice of one's own.
example_zh: 当天使变成魔鬼，我开始意识到，活在天堂还是地狱，只在乎你自己怎么去选择。

example_en: Chinese garbage classification policy has come into operation in several cities.
example_zh: 中国垃圾分类政策已经在多个城市生效。

example_en: Personal feelings should not come into play when you are making business decisions.
example_zh: 为公事作决策不应掺入个人感情成分。

example_en: When did the train come into use?
example_zh: 这火车什么时候开始使用的？

example_en: Maybe something useful will come of Clinton's idea, but I'm not all that hopeful.
example_zh: 也许克林顿的想法会带来一些有用的东西，但我并不抱太大希望。

example_en: A button had come off my coat.
example_zh: 我的外套掉了一颗纽扣。

example_en: Come on! Quick! They'll see us!
example_zh: 快点吧！快！他们会看见我们的！

example_en: When does her new book come out?
example_zh: 她的新书什么时候出版？

example_en: If you're stuck for something to do tonight, come out with us.
example_zh: 你要是正愁今晚没事做，就跟我们一块儿出去吧。

example_en: He'll never come round to our way of thinking.
example_zh: 他绝不会改变观点与我们的想法一致。

example_en: The team will come through this barren patch and start to win again.
example_zh: 这个队将会在经历这段低潮时期之后再创佳绩。

example_en: New evidence has recently come to light.
example_zh: 新的证据最近已披露出来。

example_en: The conference will come to a close this afternoon.
example_zh: 今天下午会议闭幕。

example_en: I was heartsick, for I felt that the splendid years of my carefree childhood had come to an end.
example_zh: 我很难过，因为我觉得我无忧无虑的美好童年生活结束了。

example_en: Teams often come to blows with each other.
example_zh: 队伍之间还常常打斗起来。

example_en: By reading aloud, the words on the paper come to life.
example_zh: 通过大声朗读，纸上的文字变得生动起来。

example_en: Don't worry, we'll see that the children come to no harm.
example_zh: 别担心，我们会保证孩子们安然无恙的。

example_en: Perhaps we can come to terms.
example_zh: 也许我们可以达成协议。

example_en: An unexplained death is difficult to come to terms with.
example_zh: 原因不明的死亡是难以接受的。

example_en: Don't beat about the bush.Please come to the point.
example_zh: 说话不要绕圈子， 请直说吧。

example_en: If I win, it will be a dream come true.
example_zh: 如果我赢了，那就是梦想成真。

example_en: What heading does this come under?
example_zh: 这该归入哪一级标题？

example_en: We watched the sun come up.
example_zh: 我们观看了日出。

example_en: We expect to come up against a lot of opposition to the plan.
example_zh: 我们预料这个计划会遭到很多人的反对。

example_en: As operating licenses come up for renewal, dam removal and habitat restoration to original stream flows will be among the options considered.
example_zh: 随着运营许可证的更新，大坝的拆除和原始河流的栖息地恢复将是备选方案之一。

example_en: His performance didn't really come up to his usual high standard.
example_zh: 他的表现没有真正达到他往常的高水平。

example_en: Keep your eye on these jokers, you never know what they will come up with.
example_zh: 盯住这些家伙，你永远不知道他们会想出什么来。

example_en: He promised to support her come what may.
example_zh: 他答应不管出现什么问题都支持她。

example_en: She was a little wild, but it was beneath her to commit a crime.
example_zh: 她有点野，但是她不会犯罪。

example_en: A key process in interpersonal interaction is that of social comparison, in that we evaluate ourselves in terms of how we compare to others.
example_zh: 人际交往的一个关键过程是社会比较，在这个过程中，我们通过与他人的比较来评价自己。

example_en: She must be made to comply with the rules.
example_zh: 必须让她遵守规则。

example_en: It is important to have someone you can confide in.
example_zh: 有一位心腹知己很重要。

example_en: True education does not consist in simply being taught facts.
example_zh: 真正的教育并不在于简单地讲授事实。

example_en: The development will consist of 66 dwellings and a number of offices.
example_zh: 新建楼区将由66栋住房和一些办公用房组成。

example_en: He needed to consult with an attorney.
example_zh: 他需要和律师咨询。

example_en: Would you like to contribute to our collection?
example_zh: 你愿意给我们的募捐捐款吗？

example_en: She'll cook up a convincing explanation.
example_zh: 她将编造一个有说服力的解释。

example_en: He has had time to cool down and look at what happened more objectively.
example_zh: 他有时间平静下来，并且更加客观地考虑发生的一切。

example_en: We've got to give him some time to cool off.
example_zh: 我们必须给他时间让他冷静下来。

example_en: Fit people are better able to cope with stress.
example_zh: 健康的人较能应付压力。

example_en: On the first day, my hands could not help but sweat.
example_zh: 第一天，我的手忍不住出汗。

example_en: THE 60 SECOND COUNT DOWN HAS BEGUN!
example_zh: 已经开始60秒倒数了！

example_en: The final count in last month's referendum showed 56.7 per cent in favour.
example_zh: 上个月全民投票的最后计票显示支持率为56.7%。

example_en: Can I count on your loyalty?
example_zh: 我能指望你对我忠诚吗？

example_en: It's also too early to count out the longstanding rich countries' club called the Group of Seven.
example_zh: 而且将长期的富国俱乐部七国集团排除在外也为时过早。

example_en: She can count up to 10 in Italian.
example_zh: 她可以用意大利语数到10。

example_en: You can't just count upon one single person to get the work done properly.
example_zh: 单指一个人是不能把事情做好的。

example_en: The glass cover for this is jointed in the middle.
example_zh: 这个东西的玻璃盖是用活动接头从中间接起来的。

example_en: He suspects there's a conspiracy to cover up the crime.
example_zh: 他怀疑有掩盖这桩罪行的阴谋。

example_zh: 扳法是通过向同一方向或相反方向用力，使关节伸展或旋转的一种手法。

example_en: What can we expect of the glowing plants in the future?
example_zh: 我们对这些发光植物的未来有什么期待呢？

example_en: Her eyes flicked from face to face.
example_zh: 她的眼光扫过人们的脸。

example_en: He had to face up to his own inadequacies as a father.
example_zh: 他不得不正视自身作为父亲的不足。

example_en: With unutterable misery, the fettered little King heard the voices and footsteps fade away and die out.
example_zh: 戴着脚镣的小国王听到声音和脚步声渐渐消失，直到听不见。真是说不出的痛苦。

example_en: His mistake made the school team fail in the game.
example_zh: 他的错误使校队在比赛中失败了。

example_en: Some schools fail to require any homework.
example_zh: 有些学校没有布置任何家庭作业。

example_en: Unless you're a reporter or emergency-department doctor, you'll discover that your world doesn't fall apart when you go offline.
example_zh: 除非你是一名记者或急诊部门的医生，否则你会发现，下线时，你的世界并没有崩溃。

example_en: His grandeurs were stricken valueless: they seemed to fall away from him like rotten rags.
example_zh: 他的荣华突然变得一文不值了，似乎像腐烂的破布一样从他身上脱落。

example_en: I have a little money in the bank to fall back on.
example_zh: 我在银行还有一点钱，需要时可以动用。

example_en: Contractors who fall behind schedule incur heavy financial penalties.
example_zh: 承包商如延误工期将被处以巨额罚款。

example_en: You're too intelligent to fall for his flattery.
example_zh: 你很聪明，不会受他的阿谀奉承所惑。

example_en: Many foreign tourists fall in love with China the first time they pay a visit to this great country.
example_zh: 很多外国游客在第一次访问中国这个伟大国家时，就爱上了她。

example_en: Slowly but surely she started to fall in love with him.
example_zh: 虽然缓慢，但她确实开始爱上他了。

example_en: I had to fall in with her wishes as much as possible.
example_zh: 我不得不尽量顺从她的意愿。

example_en: The problems generally fall into two categories.
example_zh: 这些问题一般属于两种类别。

example_en: It's important to tighten up the wheels properly, otherwise they vibrate loose and fall off.
example_zh: 把车轮拧紧很重要，否则它们会振动而松脱。

example_en: Which syllable does the stress fall on?
example_zh: 重音在哪个音节？

example_en: Teeth become loose and may fall out.
example_zh: 牙齿松动，可能会脱落。

example_en: The first to fall out of the moving circle was the boys.
example_zh: 男孩子们先从不断旋转的圈里掉出来了。

example_en: She knew she must not fall prey to his charm.
example_zh: 她清楚她绝不可以被他迷住。

example_en: We should be aware that our imagination has this built-in feature, the blind spot, which makes our predictions fall short of reality.
example_zh: 我们应该意识到，我们的想象力拥有这个固有的特征，也就是盲点，这使得我们的预测与现实不符。

example_en: There is still a risk that the whole deal will fall through.
example_zh: 整桩买卖化为泡影的风险仍然存在。

example_en: Temperatures will fall to a minimum of 10 degrees.
example_zh: 气温会降到最低点10度。

example_en: But plenty of oil and gas would fall under the new laws.
example_zh: 但是许多石油和天然气未来将会纳入新法管理。

example_en: She gave him no rest, and said she would take care no light should fall upon him.
example_zh: 她没有给他任何余地，并说她会注意不让光落在他身上。

example_en: She's far and away the best player.
example_zh: 她是当之无愧的最佳选手。

example_en: The crowd swarmed ashore and soon the forest distances and craggy heights echoed far and near with shoutings and laughter.
example_zh: 人群向岸上涌去，不久，树林中，崎岖的高崖处都回荡着他们的喊叫声和笑声。

example_en: They searched far and wide for the missing child.
example_zh: 他们四处搜寻失踪的小孩。

example_en: The restaurant is not far from here.
example_zh: 饭店离这儿不远。

example_en: Death doesn't hold any fear for me.
example_zh: 死亡对我来说没什么可怕的。

example_en: Birds feed on nuts and berries in the winter.
example_zh: 鸟类靠坚果和浆果过冬。

example_en: Covered in ETFE and powered by renewable energy, this farm could grow enough food to feed up to 40, 000 people while providing housing for some Dubai residents.
example_zh: 它的外部被ETFE氟塑料覆盖，并且由可再生能源提供能量。该农场生产的粮食可以满足多达4万人的需求，同时为一些迪拜居民提供住所。

example_en: By replacing expensive grain feed with regenerative management practices, grass-fed farmers are insulated from jumps in the price of feed.
example_zh: 通过用可再生的管理方式取代昂贵的谷物喂养，那些用草料喂养动物的农民可以免受饲料价格上涨的影响。

example_en: Do you feel like eating out tonight?
example_zh: 你今晚想下馆子吗？

example_en: Do you feel out of touch with God?
example_zh: 你是不是触摸不到神了？

example_en: I don't feel up to going to work today.
example_zh: 我觉得不舒服，今天不能去上班。

example_en: It is time to fight back against street crime.
example_zh: 现在是打击街头犯罪行为的时候了。

example_en: He felt pleasantly drowsy and had to fight off the urge to sleep.
example_zh: 他感觉舒适地昏昏欲睡，不得不击退睡意。

example_en: Claire drew a stick figure on a sheet of paper.
example_zh: 克莱尔在一张纸上画了一个线条人物。

example_en: We could figure out the pronoun problem.
example_zh: 我们可以解决这个代词问题。

example_en: This summer the WFP was feeding 44% of the state's population of about 500,000. Recent floods may push that figure up.
example_zh: 今年夏天，世界粮食计划署为琼莱州的44%人口(约50人)提供了食物支援，不过近期发生的洪灾可能让这个数字上升。

example_en: Teachers will be asked to fill in a questionnaire.
example_zh: 教师们将被要求填写一份调查问卷。

example_en: Nadja had to fill out forms surrendering all rights to her property.
example_zh: 纳贾不得不填写表格，放弃对她财产的所有权利。

example_en: Warehouses at the frontier between the two countries fill up with sacks of rice and flour.
example_zh: 两国交界处的仓库里装满了一袋袋大米和面粉。

example_en: Pragmatic distance can find expression in deixis and discourse types.
example_zh: 语用距离广泛体现在指示现象和话语类型之中。

example_en: Following a game, many parents and coaches focus on the outcome and find fault with youngsters' performances.
example_zh: 比赛结束后，许多家长和教练都会关注比赛结果，并对孩子们的表现吹毛求疵。

example_en: It's always a comfort to find oneself in good company.
example_zh: 有好同伴总是一种安慰。

example_en: I'll do my best to find out.
example_zh: 我将尽最大努力查清楚。

example_en: I wouldn't like to be in your shoes when they find out about it.
example_zh: 等他们弄清事情真相的时候，你的日子就很不好过了。

example_en: We might as well finish up the cake.
example_zh: 我们倒不如把蛋糕吃完。

example_en: I will finish up with a song of Schubert.
example_zh: 我将以一首舒伯特的歌结束。

example_en: To finish with, we'll listen to a few songs.
example_zh: 最后我们将听几首歌。

example_en: We need to fire up one of the generators.
example_zh: 我们需要开动一台发电机。

example_en: It is first and foremost a trade agreement.
example_zh: 它首先是一项贸易协定。

example_en: First of all, let me ask you something.
example_zh: 首先，让我问你一件事。

example_en: First or last, baby, you know it!
example_zh: 第一，还是最后，你们会知道的！

example_en: We'll have fish for dinner.
example_zh: 我们晚饭吃鱼。

example_en: Fish live in water. A person who is in a strange or uncomfortable environment may feel like a fish out of water.
example_zh: 鱼生活在水中。一个处于陌生或不舒服环境中的人可能会感觉像一条离开水的鱼。

example_en: Do these plans fit in with your arrangements?
example_zh: 这些计划和你的安排冲突吗？

example_en: The other 90% have fit into their environments and are considered naturalized.
example_zh: 另外90%的人已经适应了他们的环境，且已经被认定入籍了。

example_en: They managed to get a fix on the yacht's position.
example_zh: 他们设法确定了快艇的方位。

example_en: One cannot fix one's eyes on the commonest natural production without finding food for a rambling fancy.
example_zh: 一个人注视一个最普通的自然产品不会不发现一种不著边际想像的食物。

example_en: How did you fix up the broken bicycle?
example_zh: 你是怎么修好这两坏掉的自行车的？

example_en: To burn brightly only to flame out a few years later doesn't make the cut in my opinion.
example_zh: 如果仅仅是做一回耀眼的流星，几年之后陨落，在我的观点中是不可接受的。

example_en: The sleeves are tight to the elbow, then flare out.
example_zh: 袖子在肘部收紧，接着逐渐展开。

example_en: Don't spill too much fat on the barbecue as it could flare up.
example_zh: 不要在烤肉上浇太多的油，因为它可能会突然烧起来。

example_en: Flowing out of the window at the stars, the stars flash out of many monotone flow lines.
example_zh: 窗外星空在流动着，繁星拖出一道道单调的闪光流线。

example_en: I had a flick through the catalogue while I was waiting.
example_zh: 我等待时浏览了目录。

example_en: Her boss would fly into a temper if a project wasn't done on time.
example_zh: 如果工程没有按时完成她的老老板会大发雷霆。

example_en: He prefers to focus on the positive.
example_zh: 他更愿意关注积极面。

example_en: Each student then picked a team to follow out of the field of 65. They watch or read about the games and chart their progress.
example_zh: 然后从65支球队中挑选一支进行场外跟踪，学生通过看球赛和读相关的球赛报道画出自己球队进步的得分图。

example_en: Otherwise outside directors will follow the example of Ms.Simmons.
example_zh: 否则，外部董事将会效仿西蒙斯女士的做法。

example_en: Winners in life set goals and follow through on them.
example_zh: 生活中的成功者会设定目标并坚持到底。

example_en: You should follow up your phone call with an email or a letter.
example_zh: 你打电话后应该接着发一封电子邮件或写封信。

example_en: If you fool about with matches, you'll end up getting burned.
example_zh: 如果你摆弄火柴，最后可能烧到自己。

example_en: I'm not working there—for a start, it's too far to travel.
example_zh: 我不去那边干活儿—首先，路太远，去不了。

example_en: My gloves have been missing for ages.
example_zh: 我的手套已经丢了很久了。

example_en: Free book giveaway for all who attend.
example_zh: 为所有参加者准备的免费赠书。

example_en: I wouldn't want to move for anything in the world.
example_zh: 说什么我也不会搬走。

example_en: For certain personal reasons I shall not be able to attend.
example_zh: 由于某种个人原因，我将不能出席。

example_en: We promised to stay friends for ever.
example_zh: 我们约定永远做朋友。

example_en: Take, for example, the simple sentence: "The man climbed up the hill."
example_zh: 以这个简单句为例：“那个人爬上了山坡。”

example_en: The report was held back for fear of prejudicing his trial.
example_zh: 因为担心会使他的审判带有偏见，该报告没有公开。

example_en: It's funny that I've treated the tumescent bump on my arm as a cowry these two days and for fear that something may be wrong.
example_zh: 有趣的是，这两天我一直把胳膊上隆起的肿块当作宝贝一样对待，生怕有个什么问题。

example_en: Is religion always a force for good?
example_zh: 宗教一向是诲人行善的力量吗？

example_en: Most Western languages have some form of distinction between masculine and feminine nouns, with some of them adding neuter nouns for good measure.
example_zh: 大多数西方语言在阳性名词和阴性名词之间有某种形式的区别，其中一些还额外加上了中性名词。

example_en: Malcolm, for instance, works in isolation but I have no doubts about his abilities.
example_zh: 例如，马尔科姆虽然一个人独立工作，但我丝毫不怀疑他的能力。

example_en: You can't fault them for lack of invention.
example_zh: 你不能因为他们没有发明而加以批评他们。

example_en: He had a great zest for life.
example_zh: 他对生命有着极大的热情。

example_en: You're not doing yourself any favours, working for nothing.
example_zh: 你干活不取报酬，对自己没有任何好处。

example_en: For one thing, he didn't trust his legs to hold him up.
example_zh: 首先，他不相信自己的腿能站起来。

example_en: And if FIFA is so inclined to be part of the solution and (for once) not part of the problem, well, this one's a ball sitting on the grass in front of a gaping goalmouth, goalie nowhere to be seen.
example_zh: 而如果国际足协如此执著于参与到解决方案中，并能(有一次)并没有参与到麻烦中，好吧，这就是一个球放在目瞪口呆的球门前的草地上，却看不到门将。

example_en: The house is up for sale.
example_zh: 这所房子正待出售。

example_en: Opposite me was a woman called Jasminder (Jazzy for short).
example_zh: 我对面是个叫杰丝明德（简称杰丝）的女人。

example_en: For sure, there is little shortage of eye-popping scenery around here.
example_zh: 可以肯定的是，这里不缺乏令人着迷的景象。

example_en: "Or anywhere else, for that matter," he could not help adding.
example_zh: “别的地方可没有，就这一点而言。”他忍不住补充道。

example_en: The smart money is on him for the best actor award.
example_zh: 内行认为他将获最佳演员奖。

example_en: His illness has taken a turn for the better.
example_zh: 他的病有了好转。

example_en: We need to plan for the future.
example_zh: 我们需要为将来作好打算。

example_en: Anyway, let's forget about that for the moment.
example_zh: 咱们无论如何暂时不要再提这件事。

example_en: They wrote thanking us for the present.
example_zh: 他们写信来感谢我们赠送的礼物。

example_en: And, for the record, he would be the last person I'd ask.
example_zh: 需要强调的是，他是我最不愿意去找的人。

example_en: He was confirmed as captain for the rest of the season.
example_zh: 他被正式任命在这个赛季剩下的时间内担任队长。

example_en: They stayed together for the sake of the children.
example_zh: 为了孩子，他们还待在一起。

example_en: You can leave your suitcase here for the time being.
example_zh: 你可以暂时把衣箱留在这儿。

example_en: When I close my eyes, I forget about everything.
example_zh: 我闭上眼睛就忘记一切。

example_en: In the end, you'll learn more and foul up less.
example_zh: 最终，你将会学得更多，搞砸得更少。

example_en: Life was never going to be so free and easy again.
example_zh: 生活绝不会再那样无拘无束了。

example_en: The wagon broke free from the train.
example_zh: 这节货车车厢脱离了列车。

example_en: Delivery is free of charge.
example_zh: 免费送货。

example_en: Markets freeze up, as neither buyers nor sellers have the confidence to do business.
example_zh: 由于买家和卖家成交信心不足，市场变得萧条。

example_en: Many members of the church sang from memory.
example_zh: 许多教徒都是凭记忆唱颂歌。

example_en: You should look out for yourself from now on.
example_zh: 从现在起你应该多为自己着想。

example_en: From time to time he passed on confidential information to him.
example_zh: 他不时地传送机密情报给他。

example_en: Sterling continues to gain ground against the dollar.
example_zh: 英镑对美元的比价继续坚挺。

example_en: Yesterday London was playing catch-up after Wall Street's tremendous 500-point gain on Wednesday night.
example_zh: 星期三晚上华尔街获得500点巨长之后，昨天伦敦也开始了奋起直追。

example_en: Gillian and her dog, Rocky, gear up for the trail.
example_zh: 吉利恩和她的狗，洛奇，为远足而全副武装。(图)。

example_en: Joining their children can help parents bridge the generation gap between them and their children.
example_zh: 融入孩子可以帮助父母跨越与孩子的代沟。

example_en: I use a small tractor to get about.
example_zh: 我用一台小型拖拉机四处来回巡视。

example_en: Each play has a theme or central idea which the playwright hopes to get across through dialogue and action.
example_zh: 每个剧目都有一个主题或中心思想，剧作家希望通过对话和行为让人们理解这些主题或思想。

example_en: Seek out ways to get ahead and begin making plans.
example_zh: 寻找方法来获得成功并且开始制订计划。

example_en: We get along just fine together.
example_zh: 我们相处得很融洽。

example_en: It's impossible to get along with him.
example_zh: 不可能跟他和睦相处。

example_en: Max could always get around her.
example_zh: 麦克斯总能说服她。

example_en: The truth is sometimes difficult to get at.
example_zh: 有时真相很难查明。

example_en: They managed to get away from the coast undetected.
example_zh: 他们设法了离开海岸，并未被人发现。

example_en: We will get back at 6 p. m. by bus.
example_zh: 我们会在下午6点乘车返回。

example_en: He's itching to get back to work.
example_zh: 他巴不得马上回去工作。

example_en: I'm a survivor. I'll get by.
example_zh: 我是个幸存者。能勉强过活。

example_en: She yelled at the child to get down from the wall.
example_zh: 她喊着让小孩从墙上下来。

example_en: With the election out of the way, the government can get down to business.
example_zh: 选举已结束，政府能够着手处理正事了。

example_en: I like to get down to work by 9.
example_zh: 我喜欢在9点之前开始工作。

example_en: Instead, help them get even with you.
example_zh: 而是要帮助他们来找到你。

example_en: I need to get hold of Tom's address.
example_zh: 我需要找到汤姆的地址。

example_en: Get in! There's bags of room.
example_zh: 进来吧！地方很空。

example_en: She failed to get into art college.
example_zh: 她未能进入艺术学院。

example_en: Anyone may sometimes get into a jam.
example_zh: 任何人都会有时候陷入困境。

example_en: It was unwise of you to get into debt.
example_zh: 你借债是不明智的。

example_en: I believe in get into hot water; it keep you clean.
example_zh: 我相信泡进热水(陷入困境)是好的，可以保持清洁嘛。

example_en: Two additional state agencies would also get into the act soon and conduct hearings of their own.
example_zh: 另外两个州机构很快也要采取行动，召开它们自己的听证会。

example_en: Direction means objectives. You can get nowhere without an objective in life.
example_zh: 方向意味着目标， 人生如果没有目标，将一事无成。

example_en: I told you. Get off the farm.
example_zh: 我告诉过你，离开农场。

example_en: We help small companies to get off the ground.
example_zh: 我们帮助小公司运作。

example_en: Can we just get on with it, huh?
example_zh: 我们能继续干下去吗，啊？

example_en: Let's get on to more important matters.
example_zh: 咱们谈些更重要的事吧。

example_en: Can we just get on with it, huh?
example_zh: 我们能继续干下去吗，啊？

example_en: Let's get out of this place!
example_zh: 咱们离开这儿吧！

example_en: 'Get out of here!' he snarled.
example_zh: “滚开！”他吼道。

example_en: Look out! A truck's coming! Get out of the way.
example_zh: 当心！一辆车来了！快闪开！

example_en: He'll get over it—young people are amazingly resilient.
example_zh: 他会克服这些的—年轻人的适应力惊人。

example_en: It took her a long time to get ready for church.
example_zh: 她花了很长时间才准备好去教堂。

example_en: I began to suspect (that) they were trying to get rid of me.
example_zh: 我开始觉察出，他们试图摆脱掉我。

example_en: She knows how to get round her dad.
example_zh: 她知道怎样讨她爸爸的欢心。

example_en: In his 1936 work How to Win Friends and Influence People, Dale Carnegie wrote: "There is only one way…to get the best of an argument—and that is to avoid it."
example_zh: 1936年，戴尔·卡耐基在他的著作《如何赢得朋友及影响他人》中写道：“世上只有一种方法能在争论中取得最好的结果——那就是避免争论。”

example_en: She didn't allow her emotions to get the better of her.
example_zh: 她没有让情绪打败自己。

example_en: First I have to get through the exams.
example_zh: 首先我必须通过这些考试。

example_en: We must get together sometime.
example_zh: 我们一定要找个时间聚一下。

example_en: "Brigid!" she screamed. "Get up!"
example_zh: “布里吉德！”她尖声叫道。“起床！”

example_en: Be careful not to give away personal information like your ID numbers.
example_zh: 注意不要泄露你的身份证号码等个人信息。

example_en: What? I was trying to give back your bag! You dropped it.

example_en: In this exciting event, any visitor can hold out his arms with the local people and cheer together.
example_zh: 在这个激动人心的活动中，任何一个游客都可以和当地人一起伸出双臂欢呼。

example_en: One CD-ROM disk can hold over 100,000 pages of text.
example_zh: 一张CD光盘能容纳10万多页的文字资料。

example_en: Their case doesn't hold together when you look at the evidence.
example_zh: 你看一下证据就知道他们的论点前后不一致。

example_en: I will say a colour and you must hold up that colour pen.
example_zh: 我会说一种颜色，然后你必须举起那种颜色的笔。

example_en: This argument simply cannot hold water in Europe.
example_zh: 这种论点在欧洲根本就说不通。

example_en: I don't hold with the use of force.
example_zh: 我不赞成使用武力。

example_en: These earth dykes cannot hold against floods.
example_zh: 这些土筑堤埝根本起不到防洪作用。

example_en: I could be about to hook up with this incredibly intelligent, beautiful girl.
example_zh: 我可能就要与那个聪明绝顶的美女相恋。

example_en: I'm not going. How about you?
example_zh: 我不打算去。你呢？

example_en: How come my toy car doesn't work?
example_zh: 我的玩具车为什么发动不了了？

example_en: After I hung up I remembered what I'd wanted to say.
example_zh: 我挂断电话之后才想起来原本想说的话。

example_en: For Gawd's sake hurry up!
example_zh: 看在上帝的份上快点吧！

example_en: Hush up! Do you want them to hear you?
example_zh: 安静点！你想他们也听到吗？

example_en: She would only play a role if she could identify with the character.
example_zh: 她只愿扮演自己认同的人物角色。

example_en: Do not idle about like this and do something useful.
example_zh: 别再这样闲混下去了，做些有益的事吧！

example_en: Please let me know how many are coming, if any.
example_zh: 请告诉我，如果有人要来的话，有多少？

example_en: If only you hadn't felt compelled to meddle.
example_zh: 只要你没有觉得是被迫去干预。

example_en: He hopes to improve on his tally of three goals in the past nine games.
example_zh: 他希望提高在过去九场比赛中打进三球的纪录。

example_en: Most drafts do not improve upon delivery.
example_zh: 大多数文稿在表达的时候没有被改善。

example_en: Dave was in a hurry to get back to work.
example_zh: 戴夫急于回去工作。

example_en: Freddy's picture is in a mess!
example_zh: 弗雷迪的画一团糟！

example_en: The opening of the scene depicts Akhnaten and his family in a moment of intimacy.
example_zh: 开头一幕描述阿肯那顿及其家人亲密无间的一个时刻。

example_en: In a pinch, dab on a little honey and then cover with a bandage.
example_zh: 必要时，涂一点蜂蜜，然后用绷带包扎。

example_en: This is her third win in a row.
example_zh: 这是她连续获得的第三次胜利。

example_en: In a sense, both were right.
example_zh: 在某种意义上，两者都对。

example_en: Well, that's good news in a way.
example_zh: 嗯，在某种程度上这是个好消息。

example_en: In a word, traditional Chinese medicine is the treasure of China.
example_zh: 总之，中药是中国的瑰宝。

example_en: Fruit and vegetables grew in abundance on the island.
example_zh: 该岛盛产水果和蔬菜。

example_en: This action would not be in accord with our policy.
example_zh: 这一行动不会符合我们的方针。

example_en: Those products have rightly been stopped in accordance with our safety routines.
example_zh: 根据我们的安全惯例，停止使用那些产品是正确的。

example_en: There is, in addition, one further point to make.
example_zh: 此外，还有一点要说。

example_en: In addition to headaches, you may develop stomach ulcers as well.
example_zh: 除了头痛，你还可能患上胃溃疡。

example_en: A 10% deposit is payable in advance.
example_zh: 须预付10%的押金。

example_en: Galileo's ideas were well in advance of the age in which he lived.
example_zh: 伽利略的思想远远超越了他所处的时代。

example_en: I've worn holes in all my socks.
example_zh: 我把我所有的袜子都穿破了。

example_en: When the police arrived, the crowd scattered in all directions.
example_zh: 警察赶到后，人群便向四面八方散开了。

example_en: In all probability he failed to understand the consequences of his actions.
example_zh: 他很可能未了解到行动的后果。

example_en: People seem to float in and out of my life.
example_zh: 不同的人在我的生命中出现和消失。

example_en: "See," said Hook in answer to Smee's question, "that is a mother."
example_zh: “瞧，”胡克回答斯密的问题，“那是个母亲。”

example_en: In any case, despite so much evidence to the contrary, many managers still agree to Theory X.
example_zh: 无论如何，尽管有这么多相反的证据，许多经理仍然同意 X 理论。

example_en: In any event, the bowling alley restaurant proved quite acceptable.
example_zh: 不管怎样，那家保龄球馆的餐厅证明是很受欢迎的。

example_en: We collected money in behalf of the homeless.
example_zh: 我们为帮助无家可归者而募捐。

example_en: You can take breaks in between.
example_zh: 你可以在两件事之间休息。

example_en: These ironclad details are irrefutable proof in black and white.
example_zh: 白纸黑字，铁证如山。

example_en: Sleep came to him in brief snatches.
example_zh: 他时睡时醒。

example_en: It's cheaper to buy in bulk.
example_zh: 大批购买便宜些。

example_en: In business, it's every man for himself.
example_zh: 生意场上都是人各为己。

example_en: In case you should need any help, here's my number.
example_zh: 万一你需要帮助的话，这是我的电话号码。

example_en: She had had the foresight to prepare herself financially in case of an accident.
example_zh: 她有先见之明，经济上作了准备以防万一发生事故。

example_en: They are much alike in character.
example_zh: 他们的性格很相似。

example_en: I was put in charge of the office.
example_zh: 他们让我负责管理这个办公室。

example_en: There, you're in check.
example_zh: 瞧，将你一军。

example_en: 'Thank you,' they said in chorus.
example_zh: “谢谢。”他们齐声说道。

example_en: He was a traitor. And he murdered someone in cold blood.
example_zh: 他是一个叛徒，而且他冷血地杀了人。

example_en: The selection of the works was done in collaboration with other institutions.
example_zh: 作品的选择是与其他院校合作完成的。

example_en: We had a surprising amount in common.
example_zh: 我们共同之处出奇地多。

example_en: The meat of the herbivore is, in comparison, far more edible and smell wise.
example_zh: 相比之下，食草动物的肉更易食用，闻起来更美味。

example_en: In comparison with the previous study, the new study expanded research subjects.
example_zh: 与之前的研究相比，这个新的研究拓宽了研究主题。

example_en: The number one thing on her list is to see her favorite band in concert.
example_zh: 她的愿望单上的第一件事就是去看她最喜欢的乐队的演唱会。

example_en: She is growing in confidence all the time.
example_zh: 她的信心在不断增强。

example_en: The system is designed to be used in conjunction with a word processing program.
example_zh: 本系统是为与文字处理软件配合使用而设计的。

example_en: A man has been arrested in connection with the robbery.
example_zh: 一名男子因与这桩抢劫案有关已被逮捕。

example_en: In consequence, retail sales in Aroca City are bound to increase substantially.
example_zh: 因此，Aroca City 的零售额必然会大幅增长。

example_en: The erratic fluctuation of market prices is in consequence of unstable economy.
example_zh: 经济波动致使市场物价忽起忽落。

example_en: In consideration of your experience in the Students' Union, I think you are more suitable for this position than other candidates.
example_zh: 考虑到你在学生会的经历，我认为你比其他候选人更适合这个职位。

example_en: In contrast, our own lives are governed by numbers.
example_zh: 相反，我们自己的生活是由数字控制的。

example_en: In contrast to cavity QED systems, the researchers can custom tailor the circuitry in many areas.
example_zh: 与腔 QED 系统相比，研究人员可以在许多领域定制电路。

example_en: In contrast with the Keblet's, he was always calm.
example_zh: 与他们成对比，他总是很镇静。

example_en: He wants to be in control of his own destiny.
example_zh: 他想要掌握自己的命运。

example_en: The building is in danger of collapsing.
example_zh: 这栋建筑有垮塌的危险。

example_en: We're up to our neck in debt.
example_zh: 我们债务累累。

example_en: They accepted what he had said in default of any evidence to disprove it.
example_zh: 由于缺乏相反的证据，他们相信了他的话。

example_en: Nuclear testing was resumed in defiance of an international ban.
example_zh: 尽管国际上明令禁止，核试验又在进行了。

example_en: Good secretaries are always in demand.
example_zh: 优秀的秘书总是很抢手。

example_en: The smaller lake ranges from five to fourteen feet in depth.
example_zh: 这个较小的湖的深度在5至14英尺之间。

example_en: The changes are explained in detail overleaf.
example_zh: 修改处在背面有详细的说明。

example_en: Humor has a positive psychological effect when we are in difficulties.
example_zh: 当我们遇到困难时，幽默会对我们的心理产生积极的影响。

example_en: Sam was in disgrace with his parents.
example_zh: 萨姆已失宠于他的父母。

example_en: You'll have to travel in disguise.
example_zh: 你将不得不乔装出行。

example_en: The two countries are in dispute over the boundaries of their coastal waters.
example_zh: 两国对它们沿海海域的边界是有争议的。

example_en: Then steam power entered the scene, putting the whole future of waterpower in doubt.
example_zh: 随后，蒸汽动力登上了历史舞台，让整个水力发电的前景一度遭到了怀疑。

example_en: Your request will be dealt with in due course.
example_zh: 你的要求将在适当的时候予以处理。

example_en: This agreement is done in duplicate.
example_zh: 本协议书一式两份。

example_en: I could tell she spoke in earnest.
example_zh: 我看得出她是郑重其事地说的。

example_en: In effect, the two systems are identical.
example_zh: 实际上，这两种系统完全一样。

example_en: Even though in error, Joly's calculations clearly supported those geologists who insisted on an age for Earth far in excess of a few million years.
example_zh: 尽管乔利的计算有误，但其计算显然支持了那些坚持认为地球的年龄远远超过几百万年的地质学家。

example_en: Though complicated in detail, local taxes are in essence simple.
example_zh: 虽然细节复杂，地方税本质上是简单的。

example_en: We are equal in every way.
example_zh: 我们在各方面都是平等的。

example_en: Never put anything down on paper which might be used in evidence against you at a later date.
example_zh: 不要在纸上写下任何东西，免得日后成为对你不利的证据。

example_en: He devoted in excess of seventy hours a week to the performance of his duties.
example_zh: 他每周在自己职责的执行上投入超过70个小时。

example_en: Would you like my old TV in exchange for this camera?
example_zh: 用我的旧电视机换这架照相机，你愿意吗？

example_en: In face of failure, it is the most important to keep up a good state of mind.
example_zh: 面对失败，最重要的是保持良好的心态。

example_en: But was it, in fact, a hideous goof?
example_zh: 但其实这真的是很可笑的错误吗？

example_en: Take the first step in faith.
example_zh: 迈出信仰的第一步。

example_en: Jeans are still in fashion.
example_zh: 牛仔裤仍然流行。

example_en: Perhaps the judge would rule in favor of me.
example_zh: 或许法官会做出有利于我的裁决。

example_en: She spoke in favour of the new tax.
example_zh: 她发表演说，支持新税。

example_en: We want to keep the real issues in focus.
example_zh: 我们要让真正的问题受到关注。

example_en: Police are out in force to prevent a recurrence of the violence.
example_zh: 警察大规模地行动防止暴力的再次发生。

example_en: He was dozing in front of the TV.
example_zh: 他在电视机前打瞌睡。

example_en: Payment will be remitted to you in full.
example_zh: 报酬将会全额汇寄给你。

example_en: Pumpkins are in full blossom.
example_zh: 南瓜花正盛开。

example_en: When we arrived the party was already in full swing.
example_zh: 我们赶到时，聚会已进入高潮。

example_en: In future, make sure the door is never left unlocked.
example_zh: 从今以后，千万别忘记锁好门户。

example_en: In general, a plain carpet makes a room look bigger.
example_zh: 一般来讲，纯色的地毯使房间显得更大。

example_en: He acted in good faith.
example_zh: 他这样做是出于真心诚意的。

example_en: Regular exercise can keep you in good health.
example_zh: 定期运动能让你保持良好的健康状况。

example_en: Rather, in the beginning artists, philosophers, linguists, writers and musicians were bound up in a movement of great force that sought to break with the past, and which did so with great energy.
example_zh: 然而，初期的艺术家、哲学家、语言学家、作家和音乐学家花了极大的气力忙于和过去断绝关系。

example_en: I've divided the money in half.
example_zh: 我把钱平均分成了两半。

example_en: The Olympic organizers say that matters are well in hand.
example_zh: 奥运会组织者说各项事务完全在掌控之中。

example_en: With better education, people will be able to build a better society in harmony with nature.
example_zh: 有了更好的教育，人们能够建立一个与自然和谐相处的更美好的社会。

example_en: The letter had clearly been written in haste.
example_zh: 这封信明显是在匆忙中写的。

example_en: In India, Teachers' Day is celebrated on September 5 in honor of the second president of India.
example_zh: 在印度，教师节在9月5日庆祝，以纪念印度第二任总统。

example_en: She sped away in her car with journalists in hot pursuit.
example_zh: 她开车迅速离去，记者们则在后面穷追不舍。

example_en: In itself, it's not a difficult problem to solve.
example_zh: 这本身并不是个难解决的问题。

example_en: They paid their taxes in kind.
example_zh: 他们以实物交税。

example_en: There is no evidence that the broker was in league with the fraudulent vendor.
example_zh: 没有代理人和奸商相勾结的证据。

example_en: Her health has improved in leaps and bounds.
example_zh: 她的健康已迅速好转。

example_en: In light of this view, spouses who are more forgiving show higher marital identity over time.
example_zh: 根据这一观点，随着时间的推移，更宽容的配偶将表现出对婚姻更高的认同感。

example_en: She is in line for promotion.
example_zh: 她有可能得到提升。

example_en: Wage increases must be in line with inflation.
example_zh: 工资的增长必须与通货膨胀率一致。

example_en: We're in luck.
example_zh: 我们运气好。

example_en: He founded the charity in memory of his late wife.
example_zh: 他创办了这一慈善事业以纪念他已故的妻子。

example_en: The rise of a major power is both economic and military in nature.
example_zh: 一个大国的崛起本质上既是经济上的，也是军事上的。

example_en: In no case will they look on passively.
example_zh: 他们决不会在一边看热闹。

example_en: The kids will be leaving home in no time.
example_zh: 孩子们很快就要离开家了。

example_en: This magazine in no way glorifies gangs.
example_zh: 本杂志决不美化各种犯罪团伙。

example_en: I'm in no one's debt.
example_zh: 我不欠任何人的债。

example_en: Where you are right now doesn't have to determine where you'll end up. No one's written your destiny for you, because here in America, you write your own destiny. You make your own future.
example_zh: 你的未来，并不取决于你现在的生活有多好或多坏。没有人为你编排好你的命运，在美国， 你的命运由你自己书写，你的未来由你自己掌握。

example_en: Each holds a particular "medicine" that can be healing, and the choice to retain such things in one's presence allows the nature kingdom easier access to one's field.
example_zh: 每一样东西都拥有一种可以产生疗愈的特殊“灵药”，而将这些东西保留在你身边的选择，将允许大自然王国能更容易地进入到你的能量场。

example_en: The trailing nuptial dress with black canvas shoes is very cute, the bride and groom in the wedding take one's ease lying on the playground on the face is brimming with the happy smile.
example_zh: 拖尾婚纱搭配黑色帆布鞋十分可爱，婚照中自由自在的新娘与新郎躺在操场上脸上洋溢着开心的笑容。

example_en: There are three ski lifts in operation.
example_zh: 有3辆滑雪缆车在运行。

example_en: Reforms are clearly in order.
example_zh: 改革显然是顺理成章的。

example_en: All those concerned must work together in order that agreement can be reached on this issue.
example_zh: 一切有关人员必须通力合作，以便能在这个问题上达成协议。

example_en: My friends endured tremendous danger in order to help me.
example_zh: 为了帮助我，我的朋友们经历了巨大的危险。

example_en: In other words, is sleep learning possible?
example_zh: 换句话说，睡眠学习是有可能的吗？

example_en: Her success was due in part to luck.
example_zh: 她的成功在某种程度上是由于运气好。

example_en: He loves science fiction in particular.
example_zh: 他特别喜爱科幻小说。

example_en: You can vote either in person or by proxy.
example_zh: 你可以亲自投票或请人代理。

example_en: We already have our core team in place.
example_zh: 我们的核心队伍已经就位。

example_en: You can use milk in place of cream in this recipe.
example_zh: 这道食谱可以用牛奶代替奶油。

example_en: In point of fact, she is their adopted daughter.
example_zh: 实际上，她是他们的养女。

example_en: In practice, however, such an attitude is counterproductive.
example_zh: 然而在实际中，这种态度会适得其反。

example_en: I got a kick out of seeing my name in print.
example_zh: 看到我的名字被印成铅字，我感到非常兴奋。

example_en: The proceedings of the inquiry will take place in private.
example_zh: 调查行动将秘密进行。

example_en: Children tend to have relatively larger heads than adults in proportion to the rest of their body.
example_zh: 与身体其余部位相比，孩子头部所占比例往往比成人大。

example_en: I do not chew gum in public.
example_zh: 我不在公共场合嚼口香糖。

example_en: After some initial problems, acetone was successfully produced in quantity.
example_zh: 解决了最初的一些问题后，成功地生产出了大量丙酮。

example_en: His honesty is not in question.
example_zh: 他的诚实是毋庸置疑的。

example_en: He came across as streetwise, but in reality he was not.
example_zh: 他看似适应都市的生活，但事实上他不是。

example_en: In regard to disaster response, this is ideal.
example_zh: 关于灾难反应，这是理想的。

example_en: When taking diagonal falls, pay attention to the rope in relation to your feet.
example_zh: 当你采取斜线坠落时，注意绳索和双脚的关系。

example_en: In that respect he needs to keep his feet on the ground and not get carried away.
example_zh: 就那方面看来，他需要脚踏实地而不能飘飘然。

example_en: Millions of people gave freely in response to the appeal for the victims of the earthquake.
example_zh: 为响应救济地震灾民的呼吁，几百万人慷慨相助。

example_en: In return, we drove John back home.
example_zh: 返回途中，我们开车把约翰送回家了。

example_en: Can I buy you lunch in return for your help?
example_zh: 感谢你帮忙，我请你吃午饭好吗？

example_en: The secret number is my phone number in reverse.
example_zh: 这个密码是我的电话号码的逆序排列。

example_en: The abbey was in ruins.
example_zh: 这座修道院成了一片废墟。

example_en: All my kids are still in school.
example_zh: 我的孩子还都在上学。

example_en: Refugees run hither and thither in search of safety.
example_zh: 难民为寻找安全四处逃奔。

example_en: Strawberries are cheaper when they're in season.
example_zh: 草莓在上市季节很便宜。

example_en: The meeting was held in secret.
example_zh: 会议是秘密召开的。

example_en: The court is now in session.
example_zh: 法庭现在正在开庭。

example_en: Food is in short supply all over the country.
example_zh: 食品在全国各地都供应不足。

example_en: The sandy beach was in sight.
example_zh: 那片沙滩映入眼帘。

example_en: That's the truth, in so far as I know it.
example_zh: 就我所知，那是真实情况。

example_en: In spite of great peril, I have survived.
example_zh: 尽管危险巨大，我还是活了下来。

example_en: To welcome the steamer, a long line of honor guards marched all in step.
example_zh: 为了欢迎轮船的到来，一支仪仗队步调合拍地行进着。

example_en: The slump on Wall Street set up a chain reaction in stock markets around the world.
example_zh: 华尔街股价暴跌在全球股票市场上引起了连锁反应。

example_en: Surprises were also in store for me.
example_zh: 令人吃惊的事也将发生在我身上。

example_en: Happiness does not reside in strength or money.
example_zh: 幸福不存在于力量或金钱之中。

example_en: In summary, it is my opinion that this complete treatment process was very successful.

example_en: Only a few people spoke in support of the proposal.

example_en: She left the room in tears so I went after her.

example_en: It is easier to think in concrete terms rather than in the abstract.

example_en: Our humanness arises out of these relationships in the course of social interaction.
example_zh: 我们的人性就产生于这种社会互动过程的人际关系当中。

example_zh: 他一旦故去，所有财产都由希拉继承。

example_zh: 确保万一乔布斯去世，苹果依然保持其苹果本色。

example_en: In the first instance your child will be seen by an ear, nose and throat specialist.

example_en: Well, in the first place he has all the right qualifications.

example_zh: 观众见到我本人时常说的第一句话往往是“你比在电视上看上去矮小一些”。

example_en: We expect better of you in the future.

example_en: From his first shows, Loutherbourg showed a knack for imagination and stage design, all in the interest of creating illusions that allowed the audience to suspend disbelief completely.
example_zh: 从他起初的演出开始，卢森堡就展现了自己在想象力和舞台设计方面的本领，这些都是为了创造幻觉以让观众完全不去怀疑。

example_en: Really, I'm not in the least tired.

example_en: This measure inevitably means higher taxes in the long run.
example_zh: 从长远来看这项举措的结果就是要多纳税。

example_en: The service here is, in the main, reliable.

example_en: In the mass production era, multinational firms tended to centralize their operations.

example_en: I've had my fair share of success in the past.

example_en: He spent a couple of months on the streets to experience life in the raw.

example_en: In the short run, unemployment may fall.

example_en: Both of these grow in coastal waters, often in the vicinity of coral reefs.
example_zh: 这两种植物都生长在沿海水域，且通常生长在珊瑚礁附近。

example_en: Dolphins sometimes play in the wake of the boats.

example_en: What in the world is he doing?

example_en: In this case, push explanations dominate.

example_en: I hope we get there in time.

example_en: I'm definitely going to get in touch with these people.
example_zh: 我一定要联系上这些人。

example_en: The contents of the package may have settled in transit.

example_en: At school I was always in trouble – my mind was never on my work.

example_en: She laughed and chatted but was, in truth, not having much fun.
example_zh: 她虽然又是笑又是侃，但实际上玩得并不开心。

example_en: The government seemed to be in tune with the popular mood.

example_en: There were cheers for each of the women as they spoke in turn.
example_zh: 女士们依次发言时，每一位都得到了喝彩。

example_en: Figure 3 shows the pin area in use.
example_zh: 图 3 展示了别针区域的应用情况。

example_en: All our efforts were in vain.
example_zh: 我们的所有努力都付诸东流了。

example_en: In view of the fact that Hobson was not a trained economist his achievements were remarkable.
example_zh: 鉴于霍布森非科班出身的经济学家这一事实，他的成就是很了不起的。

example_en: Indigenous foods like salt marsh lamb are in vogue.
example_zh: 像盐沼羊肉这样的本土食物正在流行。

example_en: She was a very honest person who was incapable of dissembling.
example_zh: 她是一个非常诚实的人，不会伪装。

example_en: He called them several times to inquire about job possibilities.
example_zh: 他给他们打了几次电话打听就业的可能性。

example_en: Next morning the king came to inquire after him.
example_zh: 第二天早晨，国王来问候他。

example_en: I'll inquire for it in this shop.
example_zh: 我将询问这家商店有没有这种东西出售。

example_en: Inspectors were appointed to inquire into the affairs of the company.

example_en: Turn the sweater inside out before you wash it.
example_zh: 你把针织套衫里面翻过来再洗。

example_en: I insist on paying for the damage.
example_zh: 我坚持要赔偿损失。

example_en: The islanders use a system of barter instead of money.
example_zh: 岛上的居民实行的是以物易物，而不是用货币。

example_en: She had no right to interfere in what was plainly a family matter.
example_zh: 这事明摆着是别人的家务事，她无权干涉。

example_en: I try not to let work interfere with my personal life.

example_en: It's a good idea to spend the first night of your holiday sleeping off the jet lag.

example_en: Education has been reluctant to join hands with business.

example_en: We'll join up with the other groups later.

example_en: We'll join up with the other groups later.

example_en: Outside the boys were sitting on the ground and, judging by the gales of laughter, they were having a ball.
example_zh: 男孩子们在外面席地而坐，从他们发出的阵阵笑声来看，他们玩得很开心。

example_en: If you jump a queue the people will not be pleased.

example_en: Members of the public would jump at the chance to become part owners of the corporation.
example_zh: 公众成员会迫不及待地抓住机会成为该公司的部分所有人。

example_en: No more panic when they go outside, jump off the jungle gym and disappear in snowdrifts.
example_zh: 当他们走到外面，从攀登架上跳下来，消失在雪堆里的时候，就不会再有恐慌了。

example_en: I've met just about everyone.

example_en: She lost it, just as I said she would.
example_zh: 我就说了吧，她把它丢了。

example_en: It is just as well that we didn't leave any later or we'd have missed him.
example_zh: 还好，我们没有晚些离开，要不然我们就见不到他了。

example_en: You looked pretty upset just now.

example_en: He's not very reliable, but I like him just the same.
example_zh: 他不太可靠，但我还是喜欢他。

example_zh: 你能保守秘密吗？

example_zh: 要跟上计算机领域所有最新的发展几乎不可能。

example_en: All you can do to prevent potato blight is keep an eye on your crops.
example_zh: 为预防马铃薯枯萎病你惟一能做的就是留意你的庄稼。

example_en: Come on, keep at it, you've nearly finished!
example_zh: 快，要坚持，你马上就要完成了！

example_zh: 列车运行时请远离车门。

example_zh: 列车运行时请远离车门。

example_zh: 她无法忍住泪水。

example_en: He was warned to keep clear of drinking wines while driving.
example_zh: 有人警告他开车时不要喝酒。

example_en: No one wants to keep company with someone who always looks upset.

example_zh: 蹲下！一定不要让人看见你。

example_en: Children tend to rely on concerned school friends to keep in touch with school work.
example_zh: 孩子们倾向于依靠有关的学校朋友来保持与学校工作的联系。

example_en: He was careful to keep from Becky what it was he had seen.
example_zh: 他小心翼翼地不让贝基知道他看到了什么。

example_en: His mother came to keep house for them.

example_en: Keep in mind that a small deed makes a big difference.

example_en: Let's keep in touch.
example_zh: 咱们保持联系。

example_en: I'm trying to keep off fatty foods.
example_zh: 我尽量不吃高脂肪食物。

example_en: Did he give up or keep on trying?
example_zh: 他是放弃了，还是在继续努力？

example_zh: 同邻居保持良好关系是很好的。

example_en: It's difficult to keep one's balance on an icy street.
example_zh: 在结冰的街道上保持平衡是不容易的。

example_en: Keep one's fingers crossed, hope for the best, that nothing will happen to upset one's plans, etc.
example_zh: 喻求神保佑一切顺利，希望不要有意外事情妨碍计划等。

example_en: He admits, though, that if he were younger or poorer he probably would not have left, "but rather have sought a low-profile Posting where one can keep one's head down and wait."
example_zh: 虽然他坦承，如果他更年轻或是更贫穷一点也许就不会辞职了，“反倒是会谋求一个安守本分的低调职位。”

example_en: Keep one's temper.
example_zh: 抑制住不发脾气。

example_en: I try to keep out of mischief.

example_en: She found it hard to keep pace with him as he strode off.
example_zh: 他大步走开了，她感到很难跟上他。

example_en: Sit and keep silence in class.
example_zh: 上课时坐好，保持安静。

example_en: You've got to keep to the speed limit.
example_zh: 你必须遵守限速的规定。

example_en: One must apply oneself to the present and keep one's eyes firmly fixed on one's future goals.
example_zh: 人们必须让自己立足于现在，把眼光坚定地锁定未来目标。

example_en: Freckle just makes you want to keep track of your time.
example_zh: Freckle 只是确保你可以记录自己的时间。

example_en: This goes together with planning: you turn a big and hairy project into a set of small furry balls you can always keep under control.
example_zh: 这与计划是相辅相成的：你要把一个庞大而棘手的项目变成一堆你总能控制住的毛茸茸的小球。

example_en: Do you still keep up your Spanish?
example_zh: 你还坚持说西班牙语吗？

example_en: I can't keep up with all the changes.
example_zh: 我并非所有的变化都能跟得上。

example_en: She turned the key in the lock.
example_zh: 她转动锁眼里的钥匙。

example_en: Reforms will kick in later this year.
example_zh: 改革将于今年下半年开始见效。

example_en: What time shall we kick off?
example_zh: 我们什么时候开始？

example_en: That makes them good at getting in, and hard to kick out.
example_zh: 这让它们容易进来，且很难被赶出去。

example_en: Don't kick up a row about such trifle.
example_zh: 不要为小事去胡闹。

example_en: Some drugs kill off useful bacteria in the user's body.
example_zh: 某些药物会杀死服用者体内的有益细菌。

phrase: kill two birds with one stone
example_en: We can talk about Union Hill while I get this business over with. Kill two birds with one stone, so to speak.
example_zh: 我们可以谈谈尤宁山，同时我把这件事干完。可以说是一举两得吧。

example_en: It was kind of scary, like.
example_zh: 这可能是有几分可怕。

example_en: He spent several years knock about Europe.
example_zh: 他花了几年漫游欧洲。

example_en: They knock around on weekends in grubby sweaters and trousers.
example_zh: 他们周末穿着邋遢的毛线衫和裤子到处闲逛。

example_en: The elephant has such great strength that he can knock down a man with it.
example_zh: 大象力气很大，可以打倒一个人。

example_en: What time do you knock off work?
example_zh: 你什么时候下班？

example_en: No sooner had I sat down than there was a loud knock on the door.
example_zh: 我刚坐下就有人大声敲门。

example_en: Keep logs to study your online profile and decide what you can knock out, download a program like Freedom that locks you out of your browser, or take a "digital Sabbath".
example_zh: 保持记录，研究你的在线资料，并决定你可以删除什么，下载一个像Freedom这样的程序，使你远离浏览器，或采取 "数字安息日"。

example_en: The racoons knock over the rubbish bins in search of food, and strew the contents all over the ground.
example_zh: 浣熊为了找吃的弄翻了垃圾箱，垃圾撒的到处都是。

example_en: You know about Andy, don't you?
example_zh: 你了解安迪，不是吗？

example_en: Who should know better than I?
example_zh: 谁能比我更清楚呢？

example_en: He found evidence of the use of child Labour and illegal working hours, along with concerns over the use of poisonous chemicals.
example_zh: 他发现关于雇佣童工的和不合法的工作时长的证据，还有所担心的使用毒物质。

example_en: Her eyes ached from lack of sleep.
example_zh: 她的眼睛因睡眠不足而隐隐作痛。

example_en: Some European leaders also like to lash out at globalisation.
example_zh: 一些欧洲领导人还喜欢抨击全球化。

example_en: You never laugh at my jokes!
example_zh: 你们听了我的笑话从不发笑！

example_en: Frank tried to laugh off his aunt's worry.
example_zh: 弗兰克试图对他姑妈的烦恼一笑置之。

example_en: They both began to laugh over nothings as children will when they are happy together.
example_zh: 任何事情都能让他们开怀大笑，就像孩子们开心地在一起的时候一样。

example_en: I've just got to do my best, and take a couple of seconds to look through the first few lines before I launch into something.
example_zh: 我要尽我最大的努力，并在投入某件事之前花几秒钟浏览一下开头几行。

example_en: Certainly it distinguished them from their ancestors, but what gave them the courage to launch out on such risky voyages?
example_zh: 当然，这使他们有别于他们的祖先，但是什么让他们有勇气进行如此冒险的航行呢？

example_en: Perhaps the opposed parties will lay aside their sectional interests and rise to this challenge.
example_zh: 反对党或许会放弃他们的局部利益，站起来面对这一挑战。

example_en: Any man can lay claim to that name if he lives on a ranch and works—drives, brands, castrates, or nurtures—a cattleman's herd.
example_zh: 任何一个住在牧场里的人，只要他从事驱赶、打烙印、阉割或培育牧羊人兽群，都可以叫这个名字。

example_en: Not all companies lay down written guidelines and rules.
example_zh: 不是所有的公司都制定书面的准则和条例。

example_en: She sold every air-conditioner she could lay hold of.
example_zh: 她卖掉了她所能弄到的每一台空调机。

example_en: The company is to lay off 1,520 workers as part of a restructuring.
example_zh: 作为改组的一部分，这家公司将解雇1520名工人。

example_en: I had to lay out a fortune on a new car.
example_zh: 我只好花一大笔钱买了辆新车。

example_en: Gossamer veils of fog lay over the dark spruce and hemlock hills that disappeared in the mist above me.
example_zh: 轻纱般的薄雾笼罩着长满云杉和铁杉的山峦，让人难以看清它们的容颜。

example_en: After the bank robbery they lay up in a basement for 2 weeks.
example_zh: 抢劫银行以后他们在一间地下室躲了两星期。

example_en: I'll lead the way this time.
example_zh: 这次我来带路。

example_en: A poor diet will ultimately lead to illness.
example_zh: 糟糕的饮食终将导致疾病。

example_en: Instead of including that paragraph, she added one that described Lengel's crabbed response to the girls so that she could lead up to the A & P "policy" he enforces.

example_en: The weak dollar is a source of humiliation, for a nation's self-esteem rests in part on the strength of its currency.

example_en: Farmers complain that land is being taken out of use by generously subsidised tree plantations.
example_zh: 种植园补贴丰厚，农民抱怨地都让种植园占去了。

example_en: There are other factors over and above those we have discussed.

example_zh: 公羊队坚忍不拔，在雷诺市以32比28的比分击败了内华达狼群队。

example_en: To use and pass off as one's own (the ideas or writings of another).
example_zh: 把(他人的观点或文章)作为自己的使用。

example_en: Dad always hoped to pass on his love of climbing to me.
example_zh: 爸爸一直希望把他对爬山的热爱传递给我。

example_en: Wearing his red superhero costume, Ewan happily helped pass out 70 bag lunches to hungry people in a park in Detroit, Michigan.
example_zh: 在密歇根州底特律市的一个公园里，伊万穿着他的红色超级英雄服装，高兴地为饥饿的人们分发了70份盒饭。

example_en: They chose to pass over her rude remarks.
example_zh: 他们决定不计较她的粗鲁言辞。

example_en: Passengers must pass through metal detectors, and their carry-on bags are put through X-ray machines.
example_zh: 乘客必须通过金属探测器检测，其随身物品也必须经过X射线设备检测。

example_en: Young people should never pass up the opportunity to go to university.
example_zh: 年轻人永远不应该放弃上大学的机会。

example_zh: 我没有注意她在说什么。

example_zh: 他突然哭了起来，求她原谅他并发誓要偿还他偷的所有东西。

example_zh: 本周他们扣掉了我15%的工资。

example_en: Pay no attention to pressure or Suggestions from the international community.
example_zh: —把国际社会的压力或建议当成耳旁风。

example_zh: 我得在离开该国前偿清所有债务。

example_zh: 你定期交纳保险费，作为回报，保险公司会一次性付给你一笔钱。

example_zh: 去向你的爷爷致敬，并给他一个拥抱。

example_zh: 鲍曼决定上诉至最高法院，而不是付钱或达成和解。

example_en: He grasped the hatchet quickly to peel off the bark and shape the wood.
example_zh: 他迅速抓起斧头，要把树皮削掉，并且修饰木头的形状。

example_zh: 婚礼标志着埃玛生活新阶段的开始。

example_en: Now, Hamilton College in Clinton, N.Y., says it will phase out merit scholarships altogether.
example_zh: 现在，纽约州克林顿市的汉密尔顿学院表示将逐步取消所有的奖学金。

example_en: The idea for the experiment came from observing the birds using tools to pick at random objects, such as a picture of a spider that was printed on some cloth.
example_zh: 这个实验的想法来自于观察鸟类使用工具随机挑选物体，比如在一些布上印有蜘蛛的图片。

example_en: Brave people who are isolated are easy to pick off.
example_zh: 孤立的勇敢之人很容易被解决掉。

example_en: We're going to go to the realm of Western jazz here and I'm going to pick on Chuck Mangione.
example_zh: 我们将进入西方爵士乐的领域，我将选择查克·曼卓恩。

example_en: Could you pick out the red kites?
example_zh: 你能挑选出红色的风筝吗？

example_en: You cannot live your children's lives for them; you can only be there to pick up the pieces when things go wrong.
example_zh: 你不能替孩子过活，只能在出现问题时帮忙解决。

example_en: Will you pick up all your toys?
example_zh: 把你的玩具都收起来好不好？

example_zh: 移居澳大利亚之说纯属异想天开。

example_zh: 警方正努力理清她在死亡之前数小时的情况。

example_en: Observe this little piece up here.
example_zh: 观察这儿的小块儿。

example_en: When the air gets closer to the shore, it's slowed down by the land and starts to pile up.
example_zh: 当空气接近海岸时，陆地会减缓它的速度并使其在此堆积。

example_en: It has taken until now to pin down its exact location.
example_zh: 一直到现在才确定了它的准确位置。

example_en: That's why I want to pitch in.
example_zh: 这就是我想帮忙的原因。

example_en: From now on, I plan on accepting the fact that I don't need to stay connected with social media all the time.
example_zh: 从现在开始，我打算接受这样一个事实：我不必时时紧跟社交媒体。

example_en: Our workplace culture, social norms and individual behaviors all play a part.
example_zh: 我们工作场所的文化、社会规范和个人行为都发挥了作用。

example_en: Everyone should play a part in protecting the environment.
example_zh: 每个人都应该参与保护环境。

example_en: The Orchestra will play at Memorial Hall.
example_zh: 管弦乐队将在纪念堂演奏。

example_zh: 在Flex应用程序上记录和回放一个脚本。

example_en: He tried to play down my part in the work and play up his own.
example_zh: 他试图贬低我在工作中的作用而夸大他自己的作用。

example_en: The authors play off the concept “time is money” in a very literal sense.
example_zh: 作者以文学化的口吻调侃了“时间即金钱”的概念。

example_en: The six-party process was meant to make it harder for him to play his neighbours off against each other. But that is true only if he gets the same agreed message from all.
example_zh: 六方会谈本来意味着使金更难利用其邻居们的互相制衡而从中获利，但是这种情况仅在他收到的各方意见完全一致时才会产生。

example_en: I saw the play on its return to Broadway.
example_zh: 这部戏重回百老汇时我看了。

example_en: Children need to play out in the open.
example_zh: 孩子需要在户外玩耍。

example_en: These rough roads can play the devil with the tyres of your car.
example_zh: 这些凹凸不平的道路会损坏你汽车的轮胎。

example_en: Don't let the pupils play up.
example_zh: 别让小学生淘气。

example_zh: 他们以一首歌曲结束了这出戏。

example_zh: 我能在这儿插个广告吗？

example_en: He answered my argument point for point.
example_zh: 他逐点应答了我的不同见解。

example_en: I wish to point out your misrepresentation of the facts.
example_zh: 我想指出你们对事实的曲解。

example_en: He reluctantly conceded the point to me.
example_zh: 他不情愿地向我承认了这一点。

example_en: The fungus may be carried on the boots and gear of humans who poke about in caves.
example_zh: 这种真菌可能携带在洞穴里闲逛的人的靴子和装备上。

example_zh: 我四处翻找，但仍然找不到任何裤子。

example_zh: 她的小说嘲弄上流社会。

example_zh: 说实话，我起初并不喜欢我的室友，因为我们的性格截然相反。

example_zh: 我要完成整个袋子的设计。

example_en: The sites shield themselves from search engines, so they do not pop up in response to online searches for the brands they offer.
example_zh: 这些网站避开了搜索引擎，所以若在线搜索他们所卖的品牌时，他们的网站是不会出现的。

example_en: Well mix the red currant purée and whipped cream mixture and pour into ice cream maker, stirring for about 40 minutes.
example_zh: 将红醋栗泥和鲜奶油混合均匀，倒入冰淇淋机中，搅拌约40分钟。

example_en: You can pour out your heart to me.
example_zh: 你可以向我倾吐心声。

example_en: They value the environmental quality they preserve over their oil imports from abroad.
example_zh: 比起从国外进口的石油，他们更重视所维护的环境质量。

example_zh: 首相因处理此事的方式而受到新闻界的严厉抨击。

example_zh: 我把偷的东西带到酒吧和公园去卖，这些东西包括一个背包、棉被套装、香水或者化妆品。

example_en: Football games often sell out well in advance.

example_en: They send out radio waves that reflect off raindrops, airplanes, bats, and so forth.
example_zh: 他们发射那些可以反射雨滴、飞机、蝙蝠以及其他东西的无线电波。

example_zh: 当人们在不知道如何真正控制它的情况下发射一个像无人机一样的自我控制飞行机器时，可能会发生一些糟糕或意想不到的事情。

example_en: The sofa will serve as a bed for a night or two.

example_en: What comes to the Faith Council is advancing some of the priority areas that the President has set forth, one of which is interfaith cooperation.

example_en: "I dare not shoot at him," said the huntsman, "for I should kill the beautiful young lady also."
example_zh: “我不敢朝他开枪，”猎人说，“因为我也会杀了这位美丽的小姐。”

example_zh: 压力是如此的正常化，以至于女性很容易将这些症状视为压力的后果而不予理睬。

example_zh: 正如亚特兰大一位罗马尼亚银行职员所说，要想找到一份好工作，“你必须像森林里的狼一样，能够嗅出最好的肉。”

example_en: He had a big smile on his face.

example_en: He made every effort to smooth out his habitual worried look and wear a sunny smile, since a happy expression can lead to genuinely happy feelings.
example_zh: 他努力消除他惯常的忧虑神情，脸上挂着灿烂的笑容，因为快乐的表情会带来真正快乐的感觉。

example_zh: 首先，你需要打起精神来。

example_en: Waiting, so and so.

example_en: I came into adult life clueless about a lot of things that most people take for granted.
example_zh: 我成年后，发现自己对大多数人认为是理所当然之事知之甚少。

example_en: He believes design must take into account the sensory side of our nature—sight, smell, touch and taste.
example_zh: 他认为设计必须考虑到我们自然的感官方面——视觉、嗅觉、触觉和味觉。

example_en: The judge will take into consideration any previous convictions.
example_zh: 任何前科法官都将予以考虑。

example_en: How dare you talk back to me!
example_zh: 你竟敢和我顶嘴！

example_en: Most important, Cricket would never talk down to children.
example_zh: 最重要的是，《蟋蟀》杂志从不以高人一等的态度对孩子们说话。

example_en: She would sit in the computer lab at her university and we'd talk into the early morning.
example_zh: 她坐在她的大学的微机室，和我聊天直到凌晨。

example_en: He argued that for very young children, thinking is really talking out loud to oneself because they talk out loud even if they're not trying to communicate with someone in particular.
example_zh: 他认为，对于很小的孩子来说，思考就是大声地跟自己说话，因为小孩即便是自言自语时声音也很大。

example_en: It's no good trying to talk me out of leaving.
example_zh: 想说服我不离开，没用。

example_en: Please let us talk over this trip to Switzerland again.
example_zh: 我们再次讨论这次瑞士之行的事宜吧。

example_en: Wealthy universities talk up the benefits their name will give graduates: namely, strong alumni networks, star faculty, and a résumé boost.
example_zh: 经费充裕的大学大谈自己的名声会给毕业生带来的好处：即强大的校友网络、名师和简历提升。

example_en: I had to have a heart-to-heart talk with her.
example_zh: 我得推心置腹地和她谈一谈。

example_en: You'd better not tangle with him.
example_zh: 你最好不要跟他发生纠纷。

example_en: I don't like the taste of olives.
example_zh: 我不喜欢橄榄的味道。

example_en: Every mom has a favourite quote and a special tone to scold or teach a lesson to their recalcitrant kids.
example_zh: 每个母亲都有自己一套教训小孩的说辞和口气。

example_en: Not only did he teach school, but he wrote novels.
example_zh: 他不但在学校里教书，而且还写小说。

example_en: Neither could find a job, so the two decided to team up.
example_zh: 两人都找不到工作，所以两人决定合作。

example_en: We can tear apart the great grass cover of the western plains and pour toxic chemicals into the soil until the soil is dead and blows away in the wind.
example_zh: 我们可以把西部平原上覆盖的大片草地撕开，然后把有毒的化学物质倒入土壤中，直到土壤枯死，被风吹走。

example_en: They relentlessly tear at the flowers they see.
example_zh: 他们见花就摘，毫不爱惜。

example_en: Those qualities are still there, visible only to those who can tear away the carapace of convention that encrusts the Mona Lisa.
example_zh: 这些特质依然存在，但只有那些能够撕开蒙娜丽莎身上那层厚重的，用常规构制的外壳的人才能看见。

example_en: Years later, we decided to tear down our ugly house and build a beautiful one with a garden.
example_zh: 几年后，我们决定拆掉这个难看的房子，建一座带花园的漂亮房子。

example_en: Wash scallop and soak in water for 2 hours . Tear into shreds.
example_zh: 瑶柱洗净，用清水浸2小时后撕碎。

example_en: Tear off this coupon and use it to get RMB5 off your next book.
example_zh: 撕下这张优惠券，你下次再买书时就可以省5块钱。

example_en: The phrasal verb 'tear up' is separable because you can say 'She tore the letter up' or 'She tore up the letter'.
example_zh: * tear up 是可以分开的短语动词，因为既可以说 She tore the letter up ，又可以说 She tore up the letter。

example_en: Please bear sth or sb out your telephone message by writing to me.
example_zh: 请写信证实你在电话中传达的消息。

example_en: The attic had lots of stories to tell about his family.

example_en: It was impossible to tell from his mien whether he was offended.

example_en: Dont tell off your boss and co-workers, even if you think they deserve it.
example_zh: 即使你认为他们该骂，也不要责骂你的上司和同事。

example_en: You shouldn't tell on other guys.

example_en: The two sides can be hard to tell apart.

example_en: It was impossible to tell from his mien whether he was offended.

example_en: I tend to work in bursts.

example_en: I would like to propose a vote of thanks to our host.

example_en: 'That is wrong,' he asserted.

example_en: That would mean voting no, that is to say, using the veto.

example_en: I began sifting through the mass of evidence.

example_en: Neither of them chose the moment that had transformed them.
example_zh: 他们都没有选择那个改变了他们的时刻。

example_en: As you've seen, the more the more business logic is externalized and centralized, the easier it becomes to manage.
example_zh: 如您所见，越来越多的业务逻辑被外化和集中化，同时也更易于管理。

example_en: There was widespread support for him among the rank and file.
example_zh: 在普通员工中他得到广泛的支持。

example_en: I'd like one the same as yours.
example_zh: 我要一个和你一样的。

example_en: Then and there they gave each other a sound thrashing.
example_zh: 就在那时，他们互相狠狠地殴打在一起。

example_en: Sir Alexander Fleming did not, as legend would have it, look at the mold on a piece of cheese and get the idea for penicillin there and then.
example_zh: 亚历山大·弗莱明爵士并没有像传说中那样，看着一块奶酪上的霉菌，当场就想到了发明青霉素。

example_en: I like to think back to high school, when I could bolt down three or four burgers and a pile of French fries.
example_zh: 我喜欢回想高中时，那时我可以一气吞下三四个汉堡和一大堆炸薯条。

example_en: I like to think back to high school, when I could bolt down three or four burgers and a pile of French fries.
example_zh: 我喜欢回想高中时，那时我可以一气吞下三四个汉堡和一大堆炸薯条。

example_en: I hope you think better of it.
example_zh: 我希望你能重新考虑一下。

example_zh: 爱丽丝想：“摔了这一跤之后，我从楼梯上滚下来就不算回事。”

example_en: It supports what we might almost think of as conventional wisdom.
example_zh: 它支持了我们几乎可以认为是传统智慧的观点。

example_en: You can't think out a number to describe the twenty-five standard deviation event; it's just too large a number for any of us to comprehend.

example_en: People should think over the possible risks before deciding where to live.

example_en: You should think twice about employing someone you've never met.

example_zh: 你花200元就可以买走这架钢琴，另外奉送这张琴凳。

example_en: His objective was to tire out the climbers.

example_en: That's true, to a certain extent.

example_en: She awoke to a day of brilliant sunshine.

example_zh: 他在这张照片中照得挺不错的。

example_en: To all appearances he was just the commonplace planter who had fallen upon evil days .

example_en: She stood up and began to pace to and fro.
example_zh: 她站起来开始来回地踱步。

phrase: to be on the safe side
example_en: I took some extra cash just to be on the safe side.
example_zh: 我多带了一些现金，以防万一。

example_en: I was reasonably fit, played a lot of tennis, and didn't smoke or drink to excess.
example_zh: 我那时很健康，常打网球，不过度抽烟或喝酒。

example_zh: 付清银行到期期票对一个人信誉来讲是很必要的。

example_zh: 作为教育技术专家，我们应该如何维持我们的专业知识和能力？

example_en: These statements are, to some degree, all correct.

phrase: to the best of one's ability

example_en: In any case, despite so much evidence to the contrary, many managers still agree to Theory X.
example_zh: 无论如何，尽管有这么多相反的证据，许多经理仍然同意 X 理论。

example_en: If patience is worth anything, it must endure to the end of time.
example_zh: 如果忍耐比做任何事情都有价值 那必须忍受到最后一刻。

example_en: She has always been to the fore at moments of crisis.
example_zh: 在危急时刻她总是挺身而出。

example_zh: 她可能有个好脑子，应该充分加以利用。

example_zh: 当涉及到你的考试或家庭作业的字母分数时，你可能会注意到没有字母。你想过为什么会这样吗？

example_en: Oh, dear, I'm used to the life in the country.

example_en: My advice is that you not pay attention to the number of steps and ingredients, because they can be deceiving.
example_zh: 我的建议是，不要注意步骤和配料的数量，因为它们可能具有欺骗性。

example_zh: 这封信简短扼要。

example_en: In fact, the blue- and the white-collar workers have become economic puppets who dance to the tune of automated machines and bureaucratic management.
example_zh: 事实上，蓝领和白领工人已经变成了经济上的木偶，随着自动化机器和官僚管理的节奏起舞。

example_zh: 我们的资源极端紧缺。

example_zh: 数学和英语当然很重要，但在当今世界，他们还需要其他技能来帮助他们。

example_en: This is yet another success for Chang'e-4. On January 2, the probe (探测器) became the first lander to touch down on the far side of the moon.
example_zh: 这是嫦娥四号的又一个成功之举。1月2日，该探测器成为第一个降落在月球背面的着陆器。

example_zh: 她实在不想触碰如此令人窘迫的话题。

example_en: Rather than merely a sign, it is the root from which we can trace back to our ancestor, the tie that helps bind us to other members of the same clan, the dignity most people hope to live for.
example_zh: 它不仅仅是一种标志，更是我们可以追溯到祖先的根源，是将我们与同族其他成员联系在一起的纽带，是大多数人希望为之而活的尊严。

example_en: The police have so far failed to track down the attacker.
example_zh: 警方至今未能追捕到攻击者。

example_en: The train went on up the track out of sight, around one of the hills of burnt timber.
example_zh: 火车顺着铁轨行驶着，绕过一座树木被烧焦的小山丘，消失在视线中。

example_en: The governor aired some ideas about pepping up trade in the region.
example_zh: 政府宣传在该地区促进贸易的一些想法。

example_en: Wasn't your decision to trade off programmer efficiency, security, and software reliability for run time performance a fundamental mistake?
example_zh: 你在为运行时性能权衡编程效率、安全、软件可靠性而做出的决定是否是一个根本错误？

example_en: They trade on people's insecurity to sell them insurance.
example_zh: 他们利用人们的不安全感向他们推销保险。

example_en: Through the econometrics tools, it observes and studies on the stimulating effects of technology spillover in international trade upon China's economic growth.
example_zh: 第四章为核心实证部分，是对国际贸易技术溢出效应对我国经济增长的影响进行计量分析。

example_en: Away he fled on his swift horse, taking the fastest route, a lonely forest trail.
example_zh: 他跨上自己的千里马，选择最快的路线，朝着森林里一条偏僻的小路奔去。

example_en: The crowd began to trail off when the speaker continued for over an hour.
example_zh: 发言的人接连不断地讲了一个多小时，听众开始无精打采地走开了。

example_en: She hinted at the possibility of a treat of some sort.
example_zh: 她暗示可以找找乐子什么的。

example_zh: 他们拒绝在平等的基础上与我们谈判。

example_en: Be careful you don't trip up on the step.
example_zh: 你小心别在台阶上绊倒了。

example_en: Let the child try on as many as she likes.
example_zh: 让这个孩子爱试穿多少就试多少吧。

example_en: D try one's best to do sth.

example_en: He got to try out all the new software.
example_zh: 他得以试用了所有的新软件。

example_en: How much should you tuck away for a rainy day?
example_zh: 多少你的小卖店距离未雨绸缪？

example_en: Tuck in your shirt; it looks awful hanging out of your pants.
example_zh: 把你的衬衣掖进去；垂在长裤外面看起来很糟糕。

example_zh: 请帮我卷起袖子。

example_zh: 姚明在NBA季后赛第一轮对阵波特兰开拓者的比赛中摔倒在地，任何看到这一幕的人都会同情他。

example_zh: 每周六晚上，数百万人都会收听这个从9月一直播放到圣诞节的电台节目。

example_en: You can start now to tune in to your own physical, social and spiritual needs.
example_zh: 你可以现在开始了解你自己身体、社交和精神方面的需要了。
