example_en: Some nations may be able to turn a blind eye to atrocities in other countries.
example_zh: 有些国家可能对其他国家的暴行睁一只眼闭一只眼。

example_en: Instead, I agree with Oxford University philosopher Nick Bostrom, who believes that the heaviest risks from AGI do not come from a decision to turn against mankind but rather from a dogged pursuit of set objectives at the expense of everything else.
example_zh: 相反，我同意牛津大学哲学家尼克·博斯特罗姆的观点。他认为，AGI 最大的风险并非源自它违反人类的决定，而是源自其不惜一切代价对既定目标的执着追求。

example_en: Kennedy exhorted his listeners to turn away from violence.
example_zh: 肯尼迪劝告他的听众要远离暴力。

example_zh: 警察试图往回走。

example_en: Could you please turn down the CD player a little?
example_zh: 你能把唱片播放机的声音关小一点吗？

example_en: It could well turn into some kind of a media circus.

example_zh: 关掉即时通讯和聊天。

example_en: I want to turn on the television.
example_zh: 我想打开电视机。

example_en: To be a leader of men , one must turn one's back on men.
example_zh: Plato 我的翻译： 40。 如果想做别人的领导者，就必须用后背对他们。

example_en: It didn't turn out like I intended.
example_zh: 这结果与我的本意相悖。

example_en: The scandal took a new turn over the weekend.
example_zh: 这一丑闻在周末时发生了新的变化。

example_en: They told me to stand still and not to turn round.
example_zh: 他们叫我站着不动并且不要转身。

example_en: "When somebody refuses to repay a loan, I turn the tables by requesting one myself," she says.
example_zh: “当有人拒绝还钱时，我会自己提出借钱，扭转局面。”她说。

example_en: We must stop at nothing to find those who will help us turn the tide.
example_zh: 我们必须不遗余力地去寻找那些会帮助我们的人来扭转局势，转变风气。

example_en: Tonight it's my turn to cook.
example_zh: 今晚轮到我做饭。

example_en: It wouldn't be quite the thing to turn up in running gear.
example_zh: 穿着跑步的运动服出现在这场合可不大成体统。

example_en: America has some 1.5m men and women under arms, including nearly 700, 000 in the army and Marine corps.
example_zh: 美国的武装力量有150万男男女女，包括陆军和海军陆战队的大约70万人。

example_en: There's no need to flap—I've got everything under control.
example_zh: 不必担心—一切都已在我控制之中。

example_en: They move under cover of darkness.
example_zh: 他们在黑夜的掩护下行进。

example_en: The Belgians fell back as the infantry came under fire.
example_zh: 比利时人在步兵部队遭到炮火袭击时撤退了。

example_en: Under no circumstances can we look down on others because of their humble background.
example_zh: 在任何情况下，我们都不能因为别人的出身卑微而瞧不起他们。

example_en: Under oath, Andy finally admitted that he had lied.
example_zh: 宣誓之后，安迪终于承认他曾撒了谎。

example_en: These patients are under the charge of Dr. White.
example_zh: 这些病人由怀特医生治疗。

example_en: Under the circumstances, he felt he'd been very restrained.
example_zh: 在这种环境下，他觉得他一直很克制。

example_en: The midsole and outsole under the heel of this impressive debut splays outward when the foot first hits the ground to soften impact.
example_zh: 这款令人印象深刻的新鞋，其后跟的中底和大底在踏地时会向外延展以起到缓冲作用。

example_en: I was still feeling a bit under the weather.
example_zh: 我依然感觉有些不适。

example_en: A major air-sea rescue is under way.
example_zh: 一项重要的海空营救行动正在进行中。

example_en: She cuddled up against him.
example_zh: 她依偎着他。

example_en: We must be up and doing, ere it is too late.
example_zh: 我们必须行动起来，否则就太晚了。

example_en: Patient advocates are up in arms over the possible closure of the psychiatric hospital.
example_zh: 病人的支持者们愤怒抗议该精神病院的可能关闭。

example_en: The ball looped high up in the air.
example_zh: 球高高飞起，在空中画了一条弧线。

example_en: We're mortgaged up to the hilt.
example_zh: 我们已经把什么都抵押了。

example_en: Make sure your vaccinations are up to date.
example_zh: 一定要接种最新的疫苗。

example_en: The traffic reports are up to the minute.
example_zh: 交通信息报道是最新的。

example_en: Get up, David. It's time to get up.
example_zh: 大卫，起床了。到起床的时间了。

example_en: It isn't animals who use up the world's resources.
example_zh: 不是动物耗尽了世界资源。

example_en: I used to play dominoes there.
example_zh: 我过去常在那里玩多米诺骨牌游戏。

example_en: I believe the onus is upon us to vote down the project.
example_zh: 我认为我有责任否决这项工程。

example_en: When are you eligible to vote in your country?
example_zh: 在你们国家多大才有资格投票选举呢？

example_en: Whoever likes it can take part. TV viewers vote through SMS.
example_zh: 无论是谁，只要喜欢就可以参加。电视观众通过发送短信进行投票。

example_en: The lake was not frozen sufficiently to bear her, but it was low enough that she could wade through it.
example_zh: 湖上还没有足够的厚冰可以托住她，但是水又不够浅，她不能涉水走过去。

example_en: When you wait at table tonight, be careful not to spill anything. - Leave it to me, mum. I will not breathe a word.
example_zh: 你呀，今晚站在桌子旁边伺候客人的时候，当心别把东西弄洒。

example_en: I'm quite happy to wait for you here.
example_zh: 我非常高兴在此等候您。

example_en: There were plenty of servants to wait on her.
example_zh: 有许多佣人服侍她。

example_en: Wish you success! May success wait upon your efforts!
example_zh: 祝你成功!

example_en: You will automatically wake up after this length of time.
example_zh: 你将在这段时间之后自然醒来。

example_en: By the time we wake up to the threat posed by climate change, it could well be too late.
example_zh: 等到我们意识到气候变化带来的威胁时，可能为时已晚。

example_en: We'd like nothing better than to see him walk off with the big prize.
example_zh: 没有什么能比他轻而易举地获得大奖而更令我们欢喜的了。

example_en: I was worried she would walk out or bring the interview to an end.
example_zh: 我担心她会突然退席或者终止采访。

example_en: He sat on the wall in the sun.
example_zh: 他坐在围墙上晒太阳。

example_en: My father was not at all nervous about allowing me to wander about freely.
example_zh: 父亲允许我四处自由地漫游，一点儿也不感到担心。

example_en: The consensus among the world's scientists is that the world is likely to warm up over the next few decades.
example_zh: 全世界科学家的共识是地球可能在未来几十年中变暖。

example_en: In our home it is a rigid rule to wash one's hands before eating.
example_zh: 在我们家里，饭前洗手是一项严格的规则。

example_en: These ink stains won't wash out.
example_zh: 这些墨渍洗不掉。

example_en: One would shop and cook, another would set the table and another would wash up.
example_zh: 一人会购物和烹饪，一人摆桌子，另外一人洗餐具。

example_en: The cashiers were asked to watch out for forged banknotes.
example_zh: 出纳员接到要求，要注意伪钞。

example_en: The director tried to wave aside these issues as trivial details that could be settled later.
example_zh: 那位主任对这些问题置之不理，视它们为可以后解决的无关紧要的细节。

example_en: Thee morning shadows wear away.
example_zh: 上午的影子浙渐耗完。

example_en: I start to wonder whether this novelty will wear off.
example_zh: 我开始想，这份新鲜感会不会很快过去。

example_en: Why did it wear out?
example_zh: 为什么它会磨损？

example_en: Yet three benefits weigh against these threats to privacy.
example_zh: 然而有三大好处可以权衡对于隐私的这些顾虑。

example_en: I think that whatever problems Brazil's facing now—the same will be true for any country—you have to weigh up the pros and cons.
example_zh: 我认为，不管巴西现在面临什么问题——对任何国家来说都是如此——你都必须权衡利弊。

example_en: What if this doesn't work out?
example_zh: 如果这行不通怎么办呢？

example_en: What is worse, though I make plans for a whole week, I always have to make changes later on because other things come up.
example_zh: 更糟糕的是，尽管我制定了整个星期的机会，但是我总是因为其它事而不得不改变机会。

example_en: You're wrong, and what's more you know it!
example_zh: 你错了！而且你明明知道你错了！

example_en: What's worse, he had to return to work the next day because his partner was ill in hospital.
example_zh: 更糟糕的是，他不得不在第二天回到工作，因为他的搭档生病住院了。

example_en: Their predictions turned out to be wide of the mark.
example_zh: 他们的预测后来发现太离谱了。

example_en: "You don't think I'll win out?" he asked.
example_zh: “你相信我会成功么？”他问。

example_en: Cork scrambled a 1–0 win over Monaghan.
example_zh: 科克队苦战莫纳亨队，以1:0获胜。

example_en: It won't be easy but we'll win through in the end.
example_zh: 这并不容易，但我们最终会获得成功。

example_en: We can chalk that win up to a lot of luck.
example_zh: 我们可以把那次胜利归因于好运十足。

example_en: If we all agree, let's wind up the discussion.
example_zh: 如果我们大家都同意，咱们就结束讨论吧。

example_en: You can't wink at what he did.
example_zh: 你不能对他的行为视而不见哪。

example_en: He's painting the house with a view to selling it.
example_zh: 他在粉刷房子，想把它卖掉。

example_en: They praised Tom with one accord.
example_zh: 他们异口同声地表扬汤姆。

example_en: "How I wish I could do something different today," said the twins with one voice.
example_zh: “我多么希望我今天能做些不一样的事情，”双胞胎异口同声地说。

example_en: I am writing with reference to your article on salaries for scientists.
example_zh: 我给你写信是要谈谈你写的有关科学家工资的那篇文章。

example_en: The company's position with regard to overtime is made clear in their contracts.
example_zh: 公司关于加班的立场在合同中有明确说明。

example_en: The two groups were similar with respect to income and status.
example_zh: 这两组在收入和地位方面是相似的。

example_en: We've grown up with the help of our teachers.
example_zh: 我们是在老师的帮助下长大的。

example_en: Residents were warned not to be extravagant with water, in view of the low rainfall this year.
example_zh: 鉴于今年降雨量少，居民被告诫不得浪费用水。

example_en: I'm willing to help, within limits.
example_zh: 我愿意帮忙，可有一定的限度。

example_en: Within reason, you can dress as you like or do your hair the way you like instead of the way you should because it is the fashion.
example_zh: 在合理的情况下，你可以穿你喜欢的衣服或者做你喜欢的头发，而不是你应该做的，因为这是时尚。

example_en: She is beautiful without compare.
example_zh: 她美得无与伦比。

example_en: It's our duty to make life easy for disabled people, so that they can live without barriers some day.
example_zh: 这是我们的责任，使残疾人的生活容易，以便他们有一天可以没有障碍地生活。

example_en: This meeting has been, without doubt, one of the most useful we have had so far.
example_zh: 这无疑是我们迄今为止最有用的一次会议。

example_en: He emails every week without fail.
example_zh: 他每周必定发电子邮件。

example_en: If my boy will slumber, angles without number will draw near, so fair and bright, for they only come at night.
example_zh: 如果我的孩子睡眠无数的角度将临近所以公平和明亮因为他们只能在晚上。

example_en: Without question, manufacturing has taken a significant hit during recent decades, and further trade deals raise questions about whether new shocks could hit manufacturing.
example_zh: 毫无疑问，近几十年来，制造业遭受了重大打击，而进一步的贸易协议引发了一些关于新的冲击是否会影响制造业的问题。

example_en: Dunant held that a suffering human being should be helped for his own sake only and without regard to race, religion, or political beliefs.
example_zh: 杜南认为，一个受苦受难的人应该只为了他自己而得到帮助，而不考虑种族、宗教或政治信仰。

example_en: She took the money without so much as a thank you.
example_zh: 她接过钱，连声谢谢都没说。

example_en: I don't try to memorize speeches word for word.
example_zh: 我不会尝试去逐字地背那些演说。

example_en: I do some voluntary work at the local hospital.
example_zh: 我在当地医院从事一些义务性工作。

example_en: I went back to work on Monday.
example_zh: 我星期一回去上班了。

example_en: My first job didn't work out.
example_zh: 我的第一份工作干得不好。

example_en: She had to use her head or mouth to work together with hands to finish these actions.
example_zh: 她必须用她的头或嘴和手一起完成这些动作。

example_en: I can't work up any enthusiasm for his idea.
example_zh: 我对他的想法怎么也热心不起来。

example_en: Clouds very lonesome, if the world without end.
example_zh: 云朵很寂寞，要是世界没有尽头。

example_en: Can we sit down? I'm worn out.
example_zh: 我们能坐下吗？我都累坏了。

example_en: Worth one's salt: Very worthy either because he has a good character or because he is a competent and valuable worker.
example_zh: 值得：很值得，要么因为他有良好的素质，要么因为他是一个有能力和有价值的工人。

example_en: A number of the report's findings are worthy of note.
example_zh: 这份报告里有些调查结果值得注意。

example_en: Kids would rather play than study.
example_zh: 孩子们宁愿玩而不愿学习。

example_en: I would rather pay the individuals than let the money go to the State by default.
example_zh: 我宁可把钱付给个人，也不会毫无选择就把钱交给国家。

example_en: I would rather pay the individuals than let the money go to the State by default.
example_zh: 我宁可把钱付给个人，也不会毫无选择就把钱交给国家。

example_en: I would sooner give up sleep than miss my evening class.
example_zh: 我宁愿不睡觉也不愿错过晚间课程。

example_en: "My caddie got so wound up I had to calm him down," Lancaster said.
example_zh: “我的球童很紧张，我不得不去安抚他，”兰开斯特说。

example_en: Wrap up warm before you go outside!
example_zh: 穿得暖和些再出去！

example_en: Write down (in order of priority) the qualities you'd like to have.
example_zh: （按先后顺序）写下你所希望拥有的品质。

example_en: It was the president who persuaded the West to write off Polish debts.
example_zh: 是总统说服西方国家勾销波兰债务的。

example_en: Zip up and then loop the ring around the button.
example_zh: 将拉链拉好，然后把钥匙圈挂到裤子的纽扣上。

example_en: I baked a batch of cookies.
example_zh: 我烤了一批小甜饼。

example_en: Article 2 The State institutes a blood donation system.
example_zh: 第二条国家实行无偿献血制度。

example_en: It was all a far cry from those halcyon days in 1990, when he won three tournaments on the European tour.
example_zh: 这和1990年的那些美好时光迥然不同，当时他在欧洲巡回赛中赢了三场锦标赛。

example_en: A stone marker shows the spot where the Santa Fe Trail ended in the city's historic central plaza.
example_zh: 一块石柱显示，圣达菲路在圣达菲市中心广场终止。

example_en: I listened to a lot of people handing out a lot of advice.
example_zh: 我听了许多人给予的很多忠告。

example_en: There will be a lots of volunteer helpers and guides.
example_zh: 将会有很多志愿者和导游。

example_en: There is only so much of fortune a man really neads and the rest is just for showing off.
example_zh: 一个人真正需要的财富就那么一点点，其余的都是用来炫耀的，正应了中国的古话:纵有广厦千间，夜眠三尺之地。

example_en: The Nature Conservancy has declared war on a multitude of invasive species here, from sheep to plants to the aggressive Argentine ant.
example_zh: 大自然保护协会还向众多入侵物种发起了宣战，从羊群到植物，再到具有攻击性的阿根廷蚁。

example_en: In our own time, America's musical high culture has degenerated into a formulaic entertainment divorced from the contemporary moment.
example_zh: 在我们这个时代，美国的音乐高雅文化已经退化为一种脱离当代的俗套娱乐。

example_en: Based on the criminal trial of the basic principles of relations campaign to a social vision of the law, criminal trials do realize the value of the empirical study and preliminary study.
example_zh: 基于刑事审判价值关系运动的基本原理，以一种社会法学的眼光，对刑事审判价值的实现做实证的考察和初步的探讨。

example_en: Jan. 17, 2011: To celebrate a 5-year anniversary, SBAAI holds a Reciprocal Reception of "5 Years Review and Future Outlook" in Binzhou Hotel.
example_zh: 2011年1月17日，为庆祝成立五周年，山东滨奥飞机制造有限公司在滨州大饭店举行了“五年回顾，展望未来”答谢会。

example_en: Take them to a scenic spot.
example_zh: 带他们去一处景色优美的地方。

example_en: We understand it as a sequence of cross-sections rather than something that somehow organically changes through time.
example_zh: 我们把它理解为一个横截面的序列，而不是随着时间有机地变化的东西。

example_en: They went on to ask a string of questions about our college education.
example_zh: 他们接着又提了一系列有关我们大学教育的问题。

example_en: Adams took a succession of jobs which have stood him in good stead.
example_zh: 亚当斯做了一连串对他很有利的工作。

example_en: A swarm of people encircled the hotel.
example_zh: 一大群人包围了这家酒店。

example_en: She seemed a trifle anxious.
example_zh: 她似乎有点儿焦急。

example_en: She made a vivid description of her tour.
example_zh: 她对她的旅行作了一场生动的描述。

example_en: I'll give a prize to the best idea. Talking of good ideas, here's one to break the ice at a wedding reception.
example_zh: 我将奖励最佳主意。说起好主意，这里就有一个，能活跃婚礼气氛。

example_en: The results show that magnitude of tangential velocity component of absolute velocity is larger one order than that of radial component.
example_zh: 试验表明，蜗壳内部液体绝对速度的圆周分速度比径向分速度大一个数量级；

example_en: The low temperature and low moisture micelles with a high density would have a low accelerated velocity.
example_zh: 温度低、湿度小的微团，密度大，所获得的加速度小；

example_en: She had unhindered access to the files.
example_zh: 她可任意使用档案。

example_en: Salary will be in accord with qualifications, beginning at a minimum of $2,000 per month.
example_zh: 薪水将与资质相匹配，起薪每月至少2000美元。

example_en: Some are so accustomed to pigging out, they can't cut back.
example_zh: 有些人习惯暴饮暴食了，他们不可能缩减食量。

example_en: Acknowledge your significant other’s efforts to your joint relationship and life together (no matter who is doing what).
example_zh: 所以，不管是谁为谁做什么事情，你都要表示感谢和尊重。

example_en: This might not be right, but school-leavers who fail to acknowledge as much risk making the wrong decision about going to university.
example_zh: 这不一定是对的，但是那些不承认这一点的中学毕业生有可能会做出关于上大学的错误决定。

example_en: He was well acquainted with the literature of Latin America.
example_zh: 他对拉丁美洲文学是十分了解的。

example_en: Through consumption, people come to understand, instill meaning in, and act upon objects encountered in the world.
example_zh: 通过消费，人们开始理解、灌输意义，并对世界上遇到的物体采取行动。

example_en: Once this has been done then the team can determine and share their actual velocity.
example_zh: 一旦完成了这些，团队就能确定并分享他们实际的速度。

example_en: I have nothing to add to my earlier statement.
example_zh: 我对我早先说的话没有什么补充的。

example_en: How did you adjust to college life?
example_zh: 你是怎么适应大学生活的？

example_en: But 46 per cent admit doing so at all times - regardless of whether or not their child is in the car - and 15 per cent confess they only have them for their novelty value.
example_zh: 但有46%的受访者承认，不管孩子在没在车里，他们都会使用车贴，还有15%承认自己这样做只是因为新奇有趣。

example_en: His height gives him an inbuilt advantage over his opponent.
example_zh: 他的身高成为他相对于对手的先天优势。

example_en: I can play the piano, after a fashion.
example_zh: 我会弹钢琴，不过马马虎虎。

example_en: Let my thoughts come to you, when I am gone. like the after glow of sunset the margin of starry silence.
example_zh: 当我去时，让我的思想靠近你，像那落日的余辉，映在沉默的星空边缘。

example_en: "Good," said the fox, "but what signal shall we agree upon?"
example_zh: “很好，”狐狸说，“但是我们应该统一用什么信号呢？”

example_en: They aim at improving quality rather than increasing quantity.
example_zh: 他们的目的在于提高质量而不是增加数量。

example_en: There are 52 people coming, all told.
example_zh: 总共有52人要来。

example_en: I do not allude to you, my boy.
example_zh: 我不是指你，我的孩子。

example_en: This area of Mexico has an abundance of safe beaches and a pleasing climate.
example_zh: 墨西哥的这个地区有大量的安全沙滩与宜人的气候。

example_en: The Licensee is under an obligation to keep accurate and complete records (book-keeping) in accordance with Appendix 6, in sufficient detail to enable the royalties to be accurately determined.
example_zh: 被许可方有义务根据附件6准确、完整地记录（记账），记录要充分详细，从而能够准确地确定特许权费。

example_en: In other words, he figured it was an exception to the rule.
example_zh: 换句话说，他认为这是规则的一个例外。

phrase: an excess of expenditure over income

example_en: The analogy between music and fragrance has stuck.
example_zh: 音乐与香味的类比已经深入人心了。

example_en: We need a new angle for our next advertising campaign.
example_zh: 我们需要从一个新的角度去展开下一次广告活动。

example_en: This drug could be the answer to our prayers.
example_zh: 这种药也许是对我们的祈求的回答。

example_en: The convention does not apply to us.
example_zh: 该协定对我们不适用。

example_en: In the animation you can discover another I, approximate to crazy me.

example_en: He signed to them not to give vent to any cry of admiration that might rouse suspicion.

example_en: The encouraging language should be a sincerity, glow with enthusiasm, fresh, full of magic power, otherwise not only ineffective, may still hurt the student.

example_en: "I don't think a government has properly done it for about the past twenty-five years."—"I'd go along with that."
example_zh: “我不认为在过去约25年里有政府妥善地处理过这个问题。”—“我赞同这一观点。”

example_en: THE news seems to go from bad to worse.

example_zh: 我们平均分摊所有的费用。

example_zh: 他不想详述那些天发生的所有事情。

example_en: I don't know where the news from is. Our company is a formal organization with reliable channel of information. How can we allow the gossips go the rounds!
example_zh: 也不知道这种消息是从那里传出来的，我们是一家正规的公司，我们有正常的信息渠道，怎么能允许小道消息传播！

example_en: In what is probably one of the most enjoyable boxing scenes in cinema history, Ivan Drago and Rocky Balboa go toe-to-toe for several rounds.
example_zh: 在那场堪称电影史上最赏心悦目的拳赛情节上，伊凡·德拉戈和洛奇·巴伯数个回合针锋相对。

example_en: Richard pleaded for Belinda to reconsider and not to go through with the divorce.
example_zh: 理查德恳求贝琳达重新考虑一下而不要坚持离婚。

example_en: You'd better go to bed and nurse that cold.

example_en: P2: Yes, cross the road here and there is a bus stop just around the bend. You can take a 12, 30 or 118. they all go to the Grand theater.
example_zh: 有，穿过这条马路拐弯处有一个公交车站，你可以乘坐12路，30路或118路，它们都去大剧院。

phrase: go with the current of the times

example_en: He says there's a golden opportunity for peace which must be seized.

example_en: There's nothing we can do about it. We'll just have to grin and bear it.

example_zh: 她已经开始将精力投入到教学而不是表演中。

example_en: We had to face up to the harsh realities of life sooner or later.

meaning: 汉珀 某人从做某事

example_en: On the rare occasions when they met he hardly even dared speak to her.

example_zh: 彼此难得相见，他还几乎不敢跟她说话。

example_en: Max asked Sam to ride a bicycle to pull the board with Sophia and her harp on it.

example_en: Disregarding the Rat, he proceeded to play upon the inexperienced Mole as on a harp.

example_en: You can marry her, or have a fling with her.
example_zh: 你可以娶她，也可以仅和她一夜风流。

example_en: Why does British food have a reputation for being so bad?

example_en: The next thing we might want to ask about a plant like that is what chances does it have to survive into the future.
example_zh: 我们对那类植物可能提出的下一个问题是，它存活到未来的机率有多大。

example_en: Students must have access to good resources.

example_en: Organizations have an interest in ensuring that employee motivation is high.

meaning: 有一种不可抗拒的冲动去做某事。

example_en: "I have faith in these guys," the coach said. "These are good players."
example_zh: “我相信这些人，”教练说道。“这些都是好球员。”

example_en: The trade war between China and the US will have influence on our country, but our government confidently says that we have the ability to deal with it.

example_zh: 近来，一些政客们似乎总是和环境过不去。

example_en: New pub locations usually have to contend with flat, unplastered walls where the level of surrounding noise is much higher than in cellar pubs.

phrase: have no alternative but to do
example_en: We are very sad to have to do this, but there is no other alternative now.
example_zh: 我们为不得不这么做而感到难过，但是现在没有其他的选择。

example_en: I have no concern with his mistakes.
example_zh: 我和他的错误没有关系。

给某事留下深刻印象心中有数
给某事留下深刻印象心中有数

example_zh: 综上所述，散步是一种廉价、安全、有趣而又随时可以开展的运动形式。

example_zh: 凭良心，我不能接受这样一种提议。

example_zh: 作为那把年纪的人来说，他身体不错。

example_zh: 有了更好的教育，人们能够建立一个与自然和谐相处的更美好的社会。

example_zh: 看着他的笑，我想起了阴沉的礼堂；看着他死亡般的笑，我知道我们置身地狱。

example_zh: 它们的身体外部有刺激物来帮助它们梳理毛发。

example_zh: 发布此声明的宗旨是追求客观、公平和公正。

example_zh: 这是在九世纪首次提到的关于酿酒的说法。

example_zh: 如果你将要参加一场重要的考试的话，你最好准备多一支备用的笔。

example_zh: 回想起来，我真希望自己当初考虑过其他的行动方案。

example_zh: 凯特森依次点击“开始”按钮，他们的故事开始展开。

example_en: This could be as simple as a change in sequence of activities to addition of new activities or removal of existing activities within processes.
example_zh: 例如，活动的次序发生了变化，或者在过程中增加新活动或取消现有活动。

example_en: Their bodies were in shape.
example_zh: 他们的身体都处于良好状态。

example_en: The threat of nationalization may have been seen off for now, but it will return with a vengeance if the justified anger of passengers is not addressed in short order.
example_zh: 国有化的威胁可以暂时避免，但如果乘客的合理愤怒不能在短时间内得到解决，国有化的威胁将会卷土重来。

example_zh: 在西方，肥胖的发展和其他社会的发展是同时进行的。

example_zh: 这是她连续第三年获得此奖。

example_zh: 虽然威尔斯先生是个社会主义者，但他对工人阶级几乎没有同情心。

example_zh: 总体来说，极少或没有创造任何价值。

example_zh: 意识到嫉妒并在它发展到无法控制之前就把它消灭于萌芽状态，这一点至关重要。

example_zh: 如果机器运转不正常，就会出现错误代码。

example_zh: 一方面保护个人免受暴力，另一方面为了国家的利益而使个人遭受暴力。

example_en: The power-balance has evened out in the interim government.
example_zh: 临时政府内的权力平衡已持平。

phrase: in the interim out of tune
in the interim out of tune with

example_zh: 他站在屋子的中间。

example_zh: 我今晚就是没心情参加聚会。

example_zh: 我想邀请你在重阳节期间去拜访我们学校附近的老人院。

example_zh: 我们住在邻近的密西西比州权，因此相当方便。

example_en: When climbing the hill, we not only got relaxed by enjoying the beauty of nature but also learned how to smooth away difficulties and help each other.

example_en: An inherited million allows one to get a good education, take one's time in finding a job, and to realize your goals.

example_zh: 画家彼得·布兰登的作品从来没有标注过日期，其时间表现在才开始在批评文献中形成。

example_en: If you have been thinking about buying mutual funds, now could be the time to take the plunge.
example_zh: 如果你一直在考虑购买共同基金，现在也许是冒险一试的时候了。

example_zh: Jack即将在一周以后结婚，所以为了庆祝最后的单身生活，两个老友驾车远行。

example_en: You have to take these findings with a grain of salt because respondents tend to give the answers they feel they should.
example_zh: 你必须对这些结果有所保留，因为调查对象们倾向于给出他们认为应该给的答案。

example_en: For example, I regularly acknowledge in sales situations that I am there to sell and that they should take anything I say with a pinch of salt.
example_zh: 例如，当我作为销售到客户那里，他们会对我说的任何东西产生怀疑。

example_en: I wish you'd talk sense.
example_zh: 要是你说有意义的话就好了。

example_en: To tell the truth, I'm a bit unsettled tonight.
example_zh: 说实话，今晚我有点心神不安。

example_en: To quote one medical opinion, "Thousands of people drift through life suffering from the effects of too little sleep; the reason is not that they can't sleep."
example_zh: 引用一种医学观点，“成千上万的人一生都在睡眠不足的折磨下苟延残喘；原因不是他们睡不着。”

example_en: He used to belong to the exploited class.

example_zh: 你到处跟着我究竟是在干什么？

example_zh: 但是浪漫诗歌描述了很多内在的感情，动机，心理，一个骑士试图通过改善自己，使自己有价值，能得到女性的青睐。

example_en: The inner life of a writer often says more than most readers can know; the mind of a reader can discover truths that go beyond the intent or perhaps even the comprehension of the writer.
example_zh: 一个作家的内心生活往往比大多数读者所能知道的更多；读者的思想能够发现超越作者意图之外的真理，甚至有可能理解作者。

example_en: Satellites have extended the power of communications to report events at the instant of occurrence.
example_zh: 卫星提升通讯的能力，使其可以在事件发生时立即报告。

example_en: Write to me the instant that you get the results.
example_zh: 你一得到结果，就给我写信。

example_en: This paper briefly describes the present situation of sound insulation ways universally adopted in steel ball coal mill and the noise intensity released during operation.
example_zh: 简述目前钢球磨煤机普遍采用的隔声方式及其运行过程中释放噪声强度的现状。

example_en: The moment of decision had arrived.
example_zh: 决策的时刻已经到了。

example_en: As you've seen, the more the more business logic is externalized and centralized, the easier it becomes to manage.
example_zh: 如您所见，越来越多的业务逻辑被外化和集中化，同时也更易于管理。

example_en: The radio channels were filled with the excited, jabbering voices of men going to war.
example_zh: 收音机各波段满是即将参战的男人们激动喧哗的声音。

example_en: I'd like one the same as yours.
example_zh: 我要一个和你一样的。

example_en: There's no denying (the fact) that quicker action could have saved them.
example_zh: 无可否认，如果行动快一点，本来是救得了他们的。

example_zh: 他使我渴慕他的公义。

example_en: We have got a very urgent priorities problem to thrash out.
example_zh: 我们有一个很紧迫的优先权问题得要解决。

example_en: He's supported the team for over ten years through thick and thin.
example_zh: 十多年来，在任何情况下他都支持这个队。

example_zh: 我厌烦她那小肚鸡肠的忌妒。

example_zh: 英格兰队必须拿下这场比赛才能确保获得资格。

example_zh: 四位盲人心满意足地一起说：“这回可知道大象是什么样子了。”

example_en: His body was honed to perfection.

phrase: to the best of one's knowledge

example_zh: 找个教练或参加培训课。

example_en: "This is much like 'The Hare and the Tortoise', the faster, but not the winner," thought Lizzy, who, though proud, had enough feeling to take a lesson: The quick, proud may have the start, but the quiet, steady may do more in the end.
example_zh: “这就像是《龟兔赛跑》，跑得更快的不是赢家。”丽兹心里这样想着，她虽然觉得很骄傲，但也感到自己收获了教训：跑得快、骄傲的人也许赢得起点，但安静、稳重的人最终会做得更多。

example_en: I can help you take a message for her.
example_zh: 我可以代你给她捎个口信。

example_en: I'd like to take a ride on it.
example_zh: 我想去坐。

example_en: This is such a big risk that it will probably make you never want to take a risk again.
example_zh: 这是一个很大的风险，它可能会让你再也不想冒险了。

example_en: When does she take a shower?
example_zh: 她在什么时候洗澡？

example_en: You look tired—you should take a vacation.
example_zh: 你看上去很累，应该休假了。

example_en: You should have the sense to take advice when it is offered.
example_zh: 你要知道好歹，别人给你忠告，就该接受。

example_en: Everyone should take an active part in garbage sorting.
example_zh: 每个人都应该积极参与垃圾分类工作。

example_en: When can I take an exam?
example_zh: 我什么时间参加考试？

example_en: Shall we take different routes?
example_zh: 我们走不同的路线好吗？

example_en: Please don't forget to take medicine.
example_zh: 请不要忘记吃药。

example_en: Take note of what he says.
example_zh: 牢记他说的话。

example_en: I take notes of the important points of every class.
example_zh: 我每一节课的重点我都做好笔记。

example_en: Today I say the first thing you should take out of your diet is dairy.
example_zh: 今天我要说，要首先从您的饮食中去掉的就是奶制品。

example_en: He explains, "If ant colonies had worked out a reliable way to identify the best routes between their nest and food sources, the company managers figured, why not take advantage of that knowledge?"
example_zh: 他解释说：“如果蚁群已经找到了一种可靠的方法来确定蚁巢和食物源之间的最佳路线，那么公司经理们就会想，为什么不利用这种知识呢？”

example_en: And that's a threat to take seriously.
example_zh: 这是一个需要认真对待的威胁。

example_en: And if I take temperature and I raise the temperature, the system's not going to like that very much.
example_zh: 如果我提高温度系统会发生变化，它不希望变得更热。

example_en: Packed lunches can be arranged to take with you on day trips into the valley.
example_zh: 可以准备盒饭让你们带着，在峡谷一日游的路上吃。

example_en: Did the children take to him?
example_zh: 孩子们喜欢上他了吗？

example_en: Some scenes seem to tell a story.
example_zh: 有些场景似乎在讲述一个故事。

example_en: It was impossible to tell from his mien whether he was offended.
example_zh: 从他的面部表情无法判断他是否生气了。

example_en: Confidence is the key to success.
example_zh: 信心是成功的关键。

example_en: As you've seen, the more the more business logic is externalized and centralized, the easier it becomes to manage.
example_zh: 如您所见，越来越多的业务逻辑被外化和集中化，同时也更易于管理。

example_en: It was her job to make tea three times a day.
example_zh: 她的任务是每天泡3次茶。

example_en: 95 pound women in tight skirts can throw around 300 pound muscle-bound men.
example_zh: 95磅的穿紧身衣的女人可以打到300磅的肌肉男。

example_en: In essence, the non-Duchenne smile is contrived, whereas the genuine smile seems to emanate from a deeper connection to one's joy.
example_zh: 事实上，非杜兴式微笑是做作的，然而，一份真诚的微笑像是从一个人的内心深处的快乐散发出来。

example_en: To tell the truth, I'm a bit unsettled tonight.
example_zh: 说实话，今晚我有点心神不安。

example_en: Maths and English are important, of course, but they need other skills too to help them in today's world.
example_zh: 数学和英语当然很重要，但在当今世界，他们还需要其他技能来帮助他们。

example_en: Try doing things together.
example_zh: 试着一起做事。

example_en: Manage to do sth. , try to do sth. , try doing sth.
example_zh: 这组短语都有努力尝试做某事的意思。

example_en: D try one's best to do sth.
example_zh: “尽某人的最大努力做某事”，是固定短语。

example_en: We should try to save water.
example_zh: 我们应设法节约用水。

example_en: Turn left at the crossroads into Clay Lane.
example_zh: 在十字路口向左转到克莱路上。

example_en: It could well turn into some kind of a media circus.
example_zh: 这很可能会发展成某种媒体闹剧。

example_en: Things ain't what they used to be.
example_zh: 现在情况不比从前了。

example_en: If we don't want to wait in line before the checkout counters, we can use Toshiba's new object recognition scanner.
example_zh: 如果我们不想在收银台前排队，我们可以使用东芝新的物体识别扫描仪。

example_en: From the garden you walk down to discover a large and beautiful lake.
example_zh: 从花园往前走你会发现一个美丽的大湖。

example_en: Want sb to do sth.
example_zh: 想要某人做谋事。

example_en: What do you want to do tomorrow?
example_zh: 明天你想做什么？

example_en: The children are allowed to watch TV after school.
example_zh: 孩子们被允许在放学后看电视。

example_en: Never thought I'd watch a match side by side with a Chelsea fan.
example_zh: 从未想过我竟然会和切尔西球迷狼狈为奸。

example_en: You're welcome to stay the night here.
example_zh: 欢迎你在这里留宿。

example_en: "They may wish to do something, but they won't," Lee said.
example_zh: “他们也许希望做点什么，但是他们做不到。”李明博说。

example_en: The detective picked out the words with difficulty.
example_zh: 侦探费力地辨认出这些字。

example_en: Thousands of fragments that fell off the walls have been recovered, these pieces have been put back together with great care and display a variety of images.
example_zh: 成千上万从墙上掉下来的碎片已经被找回，这些碎片被小心翼翼地重新拼在一起，展示了各种各样的图像。

example_en: Thank you. I'll give you a call this afternoon to set the time. There's nothing like seeing things with one's own eyes.
example_zh: 䖬—— 谢谢。今天下午我会给你电话以确认时间。再没有比亲自去看看更好的了。

example_en: She took the car without permission.
example_zh: 她未经许可擅自使用了汽车。

example_en: Goodness, I wonder if he knows.
example_zh: 天哪，我不清楚他知不知道。

example_en: He's gone to work for the opposition.
example_zh: 他去为竞争对手工作了。

example_en: She would like to be more financially independent.
example_zh: 她想要在财政上更加独立。

example_en: She would love to buy her daughter funky little leopard-print skirts.
example_zh: 她过去爱给女儿买时髦别致的豹纹小短裙。

example_en: I would rather pay the individuals than let the money go to the State by default.
example_zh: 我宁可把钱付给个人，也不会毫无选择就把钱交给国家。

example_en: She did at least write to say thank you.
example_zh: 她至少还写了信道谢。

example_en: Please give my regards (to sb. ) when you write.
example_zh: 写信时请替我带上一笔。
